title.en: Trump ally pledges to ‘work with people’ he disagrees with after Arizona primary win – US politics live
title.zh: 特朗普盟友在亚利桑那州初选获胜后承诺将“与持不同政见者合作”——美国政治直播

summary.en: Andy Biggs, a hard-right congressman endorsed by Donald Trump, secured the Republican nomination for Arizona governor. Following his primary win, he stated his intention to work with individuals with whom he disagrees.
summary.zh: 获得唐纳德·特朗普支持的强硬右翼国会议员安迪·比格斯赢得了亚利桑那州州长的共和党提名。在初选获胜后，他承诺将与持不同政见者合作。

body.en: Andy Biggs – a hard-right congressman endorsed by Donald Trump – won the Republican nomination for Arizona governor Sign up for the Breaking News US email Donald Trump will begin his day in Washington, before traveling to Dover, Delaware at 11am ET for a dignified transfer for the three US service members who were killed in the Middle East during Iranian strikes over the weekend . The president will then travel to Marietta, Georgia, where he’ll deliver a speech at a local high school at 3pm ET. Continue reading...
body.zh: 安迪·比格斯 - 唐纳德·特朗普支持的极右翼国会议员 - 赢得了亚利桑那州州长的共和党提名 你好，欢迎来到美国政治直播博客。安迪·比格斯——一位得到唐纳德·特朗普支持的极右翼国会议员——赢得了共和党亚利桑那州州长提名，并表示他将“与不一定同意我观点的人合作”。美国官员告诉《华尔街日报》，在向伊朗发动战争以阻止该国浓缩铀的同时，据报道，唐纳德·特朗普已批准与沙特阿拉伯达成一项协议，让美国公司在该国建设民用核能计划，其中可能包括铀浓缩设施。据路透社报道，政府计划在未来几天向国会提交的该协议不包括阻止材料用于核武器计划的保障措施。国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯 (Pete Hegseth) 周二对参议院拨款委员会表示，迄今为止，美以对伊朗的战争已使五角大楼损失了 375 亿美元。纽约市长佐赫兰·马姆达尼在一份视频声明中表示，“本杰明·内塔尼亚胡是一名战犯，是针对巴勒斯坦人民的可怕种族灭绝的策划者。”他在声明中称国际刑事法院对以色列总理的逮捕令是合理的，但承认他缺乏执行该逮捕令的法律权力。唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump) 周二宣布了一项新的关税方案，这次是从 2028 年开始对海外生产的仿制药征收关税。参议院情报委员会周二推进了杰伊·克莱顿 (Jay Clayton) 担任美国情报总监的提名，尽管遭到民主党的批评。特朗普政府暂停了向加利福尼亚州和明尼苏达州这两个由民选民主党人管理的州提供超过 10 亿美元的医疗补助资金，理由是“涉嫌欺诈和违规”。继续阅读...

reflection.en: In a political climate often marked by deep divisions, the pledge to work with those holding opposing views reflects a commitment to civic peace. Yahweh's word encourages us to pursue peace with everyone, as far as it depends on us, fostering unity even amidst disagreement. This call reminds leaders and citizens alike of the ongoing effort required to build...
reflection.zh: 在一个常常充满深刻分歧的政治环境中，承诺与持不同政见者合作，体现了对公民和平的承诺。雅伟的话语鼓励我们，只要力所能及，就要与所有人和平相处，即使在分歧中也要促进团结。这一呼吁提醒领导者和公民，建立和谐社会需要持续的努力。

verse.textEn: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
verse.textZh: 若是能行，总要尽力与众人和睦。

title.en: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
title.zh: 与爱泼斯坦有关联的模特星探在巴黎郊区被发现死亡

summary.en: Daniel Siad, a modeling scout whose name frequently appears in the files related to Jeffrey Epstein, has been found dead in the suburbs of Paris. Siad had previously denied any knowledge of the dangers posed by Jeffrey Epstein.
summary.zh: 丹尼尔·西亚德（Daniel Siad）是一名模特星探，其名字在与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）相关的文件中出现数千次，他此前曾否认了解杰弗里·爱泼斯坦所构成的威胁，现已在巴黎郊区被发现死亡。

body.en:
A modelling scout linked to the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein has been found dead at his home.

Daniel Siad, 69, was discovered on Monday in Colombes, a north-west suburb of Paris, the Nanterre prosecutor's office confirmed to the BBC.

"An investigation to determine the cause of death was opened on Monday evening following the discovery," the office said, adding that an autopsy will be carried out.

Siad's name appeared thousands of times in the Epstein files released by the US government. He had previously denied any knowledge of the threat that Epstein posed.

Epstein victim Anya - not her real name - previously told the BBC Siad had introduced her to Epstein .

"It was a complete set-up," she said, describing Siad as "essentially a professional trafficker".

During one e-mail to Epstein released in the files, Siad wrote in badly-spelled English: "In This busyness I feel like fisherman some time I cache quick, some time no fish".

Ahead of a BBC investigation on the subject published on 18 July, Siad's lawyer had said he was not available for comment.

In a recent CNN interview, Siad said he did not know the women were being abused by Epstein: "I trusted him, I believed this guy is a professional person."

Siad himself was the subject of several complaints in France, including allegations of rape, with the first filed in February. He denied wrongdoing in multiple recent media interviews, telling BFMTV in May: "I have never raped anyone in my life."

A former model who had given a deposition to police in June as part of the investigation into Siad told the BBC his death meant information he may have had about Epstein was now lost.

"An important link in the chain has just vanished into thin air, without there even having been a chance to recover the information Daniel Siad might have possessed—given that he was never questioned," she said.

"Too much time has been lost... and it is yet another way for the leads to go cold. I hope we won't have to wait another seven years to see his home searched, even though I think it is already too late."

Anne-Claire Le Jeune, who represents six women who had made complaints about Siad, said victims had been deprived of justice.

"My clients found the strength to break a particularly heavy silence, given Daniel Siad's ties to Jeffrey Epstein," she said. "They faced every stage of the proceedings with remarkable courage."

"It is deeply regrettable that the slow pace of the investigation resulted in his death before he could be questioned or taken into police custody, thereby depriving the victims of a crucial step in their pursuit of truth and justice."

Another associate of Epstein, French modelling agent Jean-Luc Brunel, was found hanged in his Paris prison cell in 2022.

The 76-year-old had...
body.zh: 一名与已故性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦有关的模特星探被发现死在家中。 南泰尔检察官办公室向 BBC 证实，69 岁的丹尼尔·西亚德 (Daniel Siad) 周一在巴黎西北郊区科隆布 (Colombes) 被发现。 该办公室表示：“发现这一发现后，已于周一晚上开始调查以确定死因。”并补充说，将进行尸检。 西亚德的名字在美国政府公布的爱泼斯坦文件中出现了数千次。他此前否认对爱泼斯坦构成的威胁有任何了解。 爱泼斯坦的受害者安雅（化名）此前告诉 BBC，西亚德将她介绍给了爱泼斯坦。 “这是一个完整的圈套，”她说，并将西亚德描述为“本质上是一个专业的人贩子”。 在文件中公布的一封写给爱泼斯坦的电子邮件中，西亚德用拼写错误的英语写道：“在这种忙碌中，我感觉自己像渔夫，有时我缓存得很快，有时却没有鱼”。 在 7 月 18 日 BBC 就此问题进行调查之前，西亚德的律师曾表示无法联系到他发表评论。 在最近接受美国有线电视新闻网采访时，西亚德表示，他不知道这些女性受到爱泼斯坦的虐待：“我信任他，我相信这个人是一个专业人士。” 西亚德本人在法国受到多起投诉，其中包括强奸指控，第一次投诉是在二月份。他在最近的多次媒体采访中否认有不当行为，并在五月份告诉 BFMTV：“我一生中从未强奸过任何人。” 一名前模特在 6 月份向警方提供了证词，作为西亚德调查的一部分，他告诉 BBC，他的死意味着他可能掌握的有关爱泼斯坦的信息现在丢失了。 “链条中的一个重要环节就这样消失得无影无踪，甚至没有机会恢复丹尼尔·西亚德可能掌握的信息——因为他从未受到质疑，”她说。 “已经浪费了太多的时间……这又是让线索变得冷淡的另一种方式。我希望我们不必再等七年才能看到他的家被搜查，尽管我认为已经太晚了。” 代表六名对西亚德提出投诉的妇女的代表安妮-克莱尔·勒琼表示，受害者被剥夺了正义。 “鉴于丹尼尔·西亚德与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的关系，我的客户找到了打破特别沉重的沉默的力量，”她说。 “他们以非凡的勇气面对诉讼的每个阶段。” “令人深感遗憾的是，调查进展缓慢，导致他在接受讯问或被警方拘留之前就死亡，从而剥夺了受害者追求真相和正义的关键一步。” 爱泼斯坦的另一位同事、法国模特经纪人让-吕克·布鲁内尔 (Jean-Luc Brunel) 于 2022 年被发现在巴黎监狱牢房中上吊身亡。 这位76岁的老人曾...

reflection.en: The tragic news of a figure linked to the Epstein scandal reminds us of the profound suffering inflicted upon the most vulnerable. Yahweh's word warns of severe consequences for those who cause harm to children, emphasizing their preciousness in His sight. This story calls us to reflect on the deep responsibility we all share to protect the innocent and...
reflection.zh: 这则与爱泼斯坦丑闻相关人物的悲剧性新闻，提醒我们弱势群体所遭受的深重苦难。雅伟的话语警告那些伤害儿童的人将面临严厉的后果，强调了孩子们在祂眼中何等宝贵。这个故事呼吁我们反思保护无辜者和维护正义的共同责任。

verse.textEn: If anyone causes one of these little ones — those who believe in me — to stumble, it would be better for them to have a large millstone hung around their neck and to be drowned in the depths of the sea.
verse.textZh: 凡使这信我的一个小子跌倒的，倒不如把大磨石拴在这人的颈项上，沉在深海里。
verse.themeEn: Woe to those who harm children

title.en: Burnham to review early prisoner release scheme amid anger over potential freeing of PC Harper’s killers – UK politics live
title.zh: 伯纳姆将审查提前释放囚犯计划，因PC哈珀杀手可能获释引发愤怒——英国政治直播

summary.en: The UK Prime Minister announced a review of the early prisoner release scheme, stating that the main perpetrator in the killing of PC Andrew Harper will not be subject to early release. This decision follows public anger and prompts a broader review of the policy.
summary.zh: 英国首相宣布将审查囚犯提前释放计划，并表示杀害警员安德鲁·哈珀的主要肇事者将不会获得提前释放。这一决定是在公众愤怒之后作出的，并将促使对整个政策进行更广泛的审查。

body.en: New PM says the main perpetrator in the killing of PC Andrew Harper will now ‘not be subject to early release’ and he will also review ‘whole policy’ Wes Streeting said the US president was “right” to demand Europe pays more for its own defence. Donald Trump has been increasingly critical of Europe for relying too much on the US for its security, and has demanded Nato allies reach 5% of GDP on defence spending by 2035. President Trump has called on Europe to carry a greater share of the burden for our own defence, and he is right to do so. The UK has always been a leading light on defence spending, but the world is changing and in these dangerous uncertain times it is clear that we have needed to go further. That’s why we’ve committed £298bn over the next four years, including an additional £15bn on top of last year’s spending review settlement. At the recent Nato summit, all members reaffirmed our commitment to 3.5 by 35 [3.5% of GDP by 2035]. Continue reading...
body.zh: 新总理表示，杀害安德鲁·哈珀议员的主要凶手现在“不会被提前释放”，他还将审查“整个政策”。韦斯·斯特里廷表示，美国总统要求欧洲为自身防务支付更多费用的做法是“正确的”。唐纳德·特朗普越来越批评欧洲在安全方面过于依赖美国，并要求北约盟国到2035年国防开支占GDP的5%。特朗普总统呼吁欧洲为我们自己的国防承担更大份额的负担，他这样做是正确的。英国一直是国防开支的领头羊，但世界正在发生变化，在这些危险的不确定时期，显然我们需要走得更远。这就是为什么我们承诺在未来四年提供 2980 亿英镑，其中包括在去年支出审查和解协议的基础上额外提供 150 亿英镑。在最近举行的北约峰会上，所有成员国都重申了我们对 3.5 by 35 的承诺（到 2035 年占 GDP 的 3.5%）。继续阅读...

reflection.en: News of a government reviewing its prisoner release scheme, especially concerning those who committed heinous crimes, highlights the public's deep desire for justice. Yahweh's ancient call to rulers in Jeremiah 22:3 reminds us that true authority is established by actively doing justice and righteousness, protecting the innocent, and preventing violence....
reflection.zh: 政府审查囚犯提前释放计划的消息，尤其是在涉及犯下滔天罪行者时，凸显了公众对正义的深切渴望。雅伟在耶利米书22:3中对统治者的古老呼召提醒我们，真正的权柄是通过积极地行公义、施怜悯、保护无辜者和防止暴力来建立的。这一原则强调了治理在维护社会秩序和问责制方面的关键作用。

verse.textEn: Do what is just and right. Rescue from the hand of the oppressor the one who has been robbed.
verse.textZh: 你们要施行公平和公义，拯救被抢夺的脱离欺压人的手。

title.en: NHS trust investigated for corporate manslaughter after Nottingham attacks
title.zh: 诺丁汉袭击事件后，NHS信托机构因企业过失杀人罪接受调查

summary.en: Police open investigation into Nottinghamshire service that treated Valdo Calocane, who killed three people in 2023 The NHS trust that treated the triple killer Valdo Calocane in the years before the Nottingham attacks is being investigated by police for corporate manslaughter....
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en: Police open investigation into Nottinghamshire service that treated Valdo Calocane, who killed three people in 2023 The NHS trust that treated the triple killer Valdo Calocane in the years before the Nottingham attacks is being investigated by police for corporate manslaughter. Calocane, who has paranoid schizophrenia, was sentenced to an indefinite hospital order after he fatally stabbed the 19-year-old students Barnaby Webber and Grace O’Malley Kumar, and the 65-year-old caretaker Ian Coates, on 13 June 2023. Continue reading...
body.zh: 警方对曾在 2023 年杀害三人的瓦尔多·卡洛坎 (Valdo Calocane) 进行治疗的诺丁汉郡服务机构展开调查。在诺丁汉袭击事件发生前几年，曾治疗过三重杀手瓦尔多·卡洛坎 (Valdo Calocane) 的 NHS 信托机构正在接受警方调查，罪名是企业过失杀人罪。患有偏执型精神分裂症的卡洛坎于 2023 年 6 月 13 日刺死了 19 岁的学生巴纳比·韦伯 (Barnaby Webber) 和格蕾丝·奥马利·库马尔 (Grace O’Malley Kumar) 以及 65 岁的看守人伊恩·科茨 (Ian Coates)，后被判处无限期住院令。继续阅读...

reflection.en: This story draws attention to peace-making and restraint. Matthew 5:9 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with mercy, truth, and restraint, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到和平与克制。Matthew 5:9提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以怜悯、真实与节制来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
verse.textZh: 使人和睦的人有福了，因为他们必称为神的儿子。

title.en: US renews strikes on Iran as Tehran claims no nuclear activity at site threatened by Trump – Middle East crisis live
title.zh: 德黑兰声称受特朗普威胁的地点没有核活动，美国再次对伊朗发动打击——中东危机直播

summary.en: US military completes 11th night of strikes as attacks overshadow diplomatic efforts in Pakistan to salvage interim ceasefire deal What is Pickaxe Mountain, Iran’s underground nuclear facility? The Jordanian army said it intercepted four Iranian missiles on Wednesday with two...
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en: US military completes 11th night of strikes as attacks overshadow diplomatic efforts in Pakistan to salvage interim ceasefire deal What is Pickaxe Mountain, Iran’s underground nuclear facility? The Jordanian army said it intercepted four Iranian missiles on Wednesday with two additional missile falling in an open area, AFP reports. The two missiles that the army did not intercept fell in “two remote, uninhabited areas, without causing any human casualties or material damage” the army said in a statement. Continue reading...
body.zh: 美军完成第 11 晚的空袭，袭击掩盖了巴基斯坦为挽救临时停火协议而做出的外交努力 伊朗地下核设施镐山是什么？据法新社报道，约旦军方表示，周三拦截了四枚伊朗导弹，另外两枚导弹落在空旷地区。军方在一份声明中表示，军队没有拦截的两枚导弹落在“两个偏远无人居住地区，没有造成任何人员伤亡或物质损失”。继续阅读...

reflection.en: This story draws attention to peace-making and restraint. Matthew 5:9 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with mercy, truth, and restraint, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到和平与克制。Matthew 5:9提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以怜悯、真实与节制来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
verse.textZh: 使人和睦的人有福了，因为他们必称为神的儿子。

title.en: Trump administration says 15 agencies will get $5bn in ‘AI for science’ effort
title.zh: 特朗普政府称15个机构将获得50亿美元用于“科学人工智能”项目

summary.en: The Trump administration announced a $5 billion initiative to use artificial intelligence (AI) to address long-standing scientific challenges across various fields. This effort will also involve an overhaul of federal research funding, shifting support towards individual scientists and AI-focused projects rather than...
summary.zh: 特朗普政府宣布了一项50亿美元的计划，旨在利用人工智能（AI）解决多个领域的长期科学难题。这项举措还将改革联邦研究资金的分配方式，将支持重点转向个体科学家和人工智能项目，而非主要通过大学。

body.en: Administration will also overhaul how US government funds federal research by supporting individual scientists and AI over universities The US will spend $5bn to tackle longstanding scientific problems across multiple fields using AI, ⁠the Trump administration said in a statement on Wednesday. The agencies will use the funding to identify the root causes ⁠of chronic diseases, accelerate drug ⁠discovery and ​develop longer-lasting building materials, among other tasks, according to the statement. Scientists will have access to the Department of Energy’s supercomputers, AI and specialized ⁠datasets, along with other components needed to run experiments using algorithms, said Michael Kratsios, chief technology adviser to Donald Trump, in an ⁠interview with Reuters. Continue reading...
body.zh: 政府还将通过支持个人科学家和人工智能而不是大学来彻底改革美国政府资助联邦研究的方式。特朗普政府在周三的一份声明中表示，美国将花费 50 亿美元利用人工智能解决多个领域长期存在的科学问题。声明称，这些机构将利用这笔资金来确定慢性病的根本原因、加速药物发现和开发更耐用的建筑材料等。唐纳德·特朗普首席技术顾问迈克尔·克拉西奥斯在接受路透社采访时表示，科学家将可以使用能源部的超级计算机、人工智能和专用数据集，以及使用算法进行实验所需的其他组件。继续阅读...

reflection.en: This significant investment in AI for scientific discovery highlights humanity's relentless pursuit of knowledge and solutions to complex problems. As Daniel foresaw a time when knowledge would increase, we are reminded that true wisdom ultimately comes from Yahweh, guiding our innovations for good. May this endeavor be pursued with both ingenuity and...
reflection.zh: 这项在人工智能科学发现上的重大投资，彰显了人类对知识和解决复杂问题的不懈追求。正如但以理预见到知识将不断增长的时代，我们也当铭记，真正的智慧最终源于雅伟，祂指引我们的创新走向良善。愿这项努力既充满独创性又怀抱谦卑，寻求造福所有人的理解。

verse.textEn: But you, Daniel, roll up and seal the words of the scroll until the time of the end. Many will go here and there to increase knowledge.
verse.textZh: 但以理啊，你要隐藏这话，封闭这书，直到末时。必有多人来往奔跑，知识就必增长。

title.en: Cocaine worth $370m seized in Liberia's biggest-ever drugs bust
title.zh: 利比里亚史上最大规模缉毒行动查获价值3.7亿美元的可卡因

summary.en: The seizure follows a long-running investigation into drug-trafficking networks, police say.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及公义、尊严与问责。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
A huge quantity of cocaine has been seized during a raid on a suspected illegal storage facility near Liberia's capital, Monrovia, in what authorities say is the biggest drugs bust in the country's history.

Videos and photos released by police showed dozens of sealed suitcases and boxes inside a lorry that investigators believed contained high-grade cocaine.

Police chief Gregory Coleman told the BBC that forensic tests had confirmed the substance was cocaine, with an estimated street value of more than $370m (£220m).

Several people were arrested during the raid in Duazon, a town about 20km (12 miles) east of Monrovia, including two foreigners and several Liberians.

The police chief said the seizure on Tuesday was the result of a long-running investigation into suspected drug-trafficking networks operating in Liberia.

"Between 2018 and 2023, apparently there was a resurface of major trafficking and transiting in Liberia. Over the last one-and-a-half years, we've been surveilling them and this is the result of that operation," said Coleman.

It is still unclear from where the drugs originated or their intended destination.

Coleman told the BBC that the police had been investigating that when the two foreigners subsequently arrived in Liberia and were arrested.

He confirmed that one of them was carrying two passports - a Spanish one and a Colombian one - while the other held a Serbian passport.

Liberian Vice-President Jeremiah Koung praised the security forces for the operation and said whosoever was found culpable would "feel the full weight of the law, regardless of who you are".

The Duazon operation follows the interception of six cargo boxes at Roberts International Airport last month after security officers detected irregularities during screening.

The shipment, falsely declared as containing food seasoning and textiles, was found to contain nearly 200 compressed blocks of cocaine destined for export, according to investigators.

The airport seizure sparked political controversy after critics accused the authorities of moving too slowly to identify suspects, raising concerns that some people linked to the case had left the country before arrests could be made.

President Joseph Boakai subsequently ordered a joint investigation involving police and the Liberia Drug Enforcement Agency (LDEA).

Several suspects have since been charged and international arrest warrants are being pursued for others still at large.

West Africa has long been regarded by international law enforcement agencies as a key transit route for cocaine trafficked from South America to Europe, taking advantage of porous borders and weak enforcement in parts of the region.

According to the Global Initiative Against Transnational Organised Crime, at least 30% of cocaine...
body.zh: 在对利比里亚首都蒙罗维亚附近一处涉嫌非法储存设施的突袭中，查获了大量可卡因，当局称这是该国历史上最大规模的一次缉毒行动。 警方公布的视频和照片显示，一辆卡车内有数十个密封的手提箱和箱子，调查人员认为其中装有高品质可卡因。 警察局长格雷戈里·科尔曼 (Gregory Coleman) 告诉 BBC，法医测试已证实该物质是可卡因，估计街头价值超过 3.7 亿美元（2.2 亿英镑）。 在蒙罗维亚以东约 20 公里（12 英里）的小镇杜阿松（Duazon）的突袭中，有几人被捕，其中包括两名外国人和几名利比里亚人。 警察局长表示，周二的查获行动是对利比里亚涉嫌贩毒网络进行长期调查的结果。 “2018 年至 2023 年间，利比里亚的重大贩运和过境显然重新出现。在过去的一年半里，我们一直在监视他们，这就是这次行动的结果，”科尔曼说。 目前尚不清楚这些药物的来源或目的地。 科尔曼告诉BBC，警方一直在调查此事，两名外国人随后抵达利比里亚并被捕。 他证实，其中一人持有两本护照——一本西班牙护照和一本哥伦比亚护照——而另一人持有塞尔维亚护照。 利比里亚副总统耶利米·孔赞扬了安全部队的这次行动，并表示，无论谁被发现有罪，都将“感受到法律的全部威力，无论你是谁”。 上个月，安检人员在安检过程中发现违规行为后，罗伯茨国际机场截获了六个货箱，随后进行了 Duazon 行动。 调查人员称，这批货物被错误地申报为含有食品调味料和纺织品，结果发现其中含有近 200 块准备出口的压缩可卡因块。 机场扣押事件引发了政治争议，批评者指责当局在识别嫌疑人方面行动过于缓慢，引发人们担心一些与此案有关的人在逮捕之前就已经离开该国。 总统约瑟夫·博阿凯随后下令警方和利比里亚缉毒局（LDEA）展开联合调查。 此后，几名嫌疑人已被指控，并正在对其他仍在逃的人发出国际逮捕令。 西非长期以来一直被国际执法机构视为从南美贩运到欧洲的可卡因的主要过境路线，利用该地区部分地区边境管理松懈和执法薄弱的优势。 根据全球打击跨国有组织犯罪倡议，至少 30% 的可卡因...

reflection.en: This story draws attention to justice, dignity, and accountability. Micah 6:8 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with justice tempered by mercy, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到公义、尊严与问责。Micah 6:8提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以带着怜悯的公义来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: What does Yahweh require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
verse.textZh: 雅伟向你所要的是什么呢？只要你行公义，好怜悯，存谦卑的心，与你的神同行。

title.en: Why are thousands protesting for education reform in India?
title.zh: 为什么印度有数千人抗议教育改革？

summary.en: Thousands of mostly young people tried to march on India's parliament to demand changes to how the education system is run.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及智慧、知识与追求真理。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
In India, tens of thousands of Gen Z protesters have taken to the streets of the capital Delhi, calling for the resignation of the country's education minister.

Starting as a satirical online movement just a couple of months ago, the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) is now one of India's most visible youth movements.

Despite its humorous origins, the CJP quickly became a lightning rod for disaffected young people in India, where there is high youth unemployment.

Despite its name, it's not a party. The movement is led by Abhijeet Dipke, a 30-year-old political communications strategist and former student at Boston University.

He told the BBC it started as a joke. "I thought we should all come together, maybe just start a platform."

But after offering the option to sign up to the movement through a Google form, he received tens of thousands of responses.

This propelled it forward into becoming a serious protest group, and on 9 July it announced a march to parliament to take place on 20 July. Tens of thousands turned out in Delhi. Hundreds also attended protests and candle-lit vigils in other cities such as Mumbai, Bengaluru and Goa.

The protest took on added significance because of the treatment of Sonam Wangchuk , a well-known engineer and activist.

He went on hunger strike on 28 June in support of the CJP at Jantar Mantar, a 300-year-old observatory in central Delhi, which is often the site of protests.

On Saturday, the 59-year-old was forcibly taken to hospital , prompting outrage from CJP supporters and drawing further attention to the protest movement. He has continued fasting in hospital.

The name of the Cockroach Janta Party (the Cockroach People's Party) came about in response to comments made by India's Chief Justice, Surya Kant.

During a court hearing in May, he allegedly compared unemployed young people drifting towards journalism and activism to cockroaches and parasites.

He later clarified that he had been referring specifically to people with "fake and bogus degrees", not India's youth more broadly.

The name is a parody of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), which has been in power since 2014.

Spilling off the internet and into real life, young volunteers to the movement have turned up dressed as cockroaches at clean-up drives and protests.

The CJP is mostly protesting over issues they have with India's education system.

The National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) is India's main entrance exam for admission to medical colleges across the country.

Nearly 2.28 million candidates sat the exam on 3 May, having studied for months - in some cases years - for the notoriously difficult paper. However, days later, it was cancelled after allegations that the questions had been leaked.

It was a big blow...
body.zh: 在印度，数万名Z世代抗议者走上首都德里街头，要求该国教育部长辞职。 几个月前，蟑螂简塔党 (CJP) 刚开始只是一场讽刺性的在线运动，如今已成为印度最引人注目的青年运动之一。 尽管起源很幽默，但 CJP 很快就成为印度青年失业率高企的心怀不满的年轻人的避雷针。 尽管有它的名字，但这并不是一个派对。该运动由 30 岁的政治传播策略师、波士顿大学前学生阿比吉特·迪普克 (Abhijeet Dipke) 领导。 他告诉英国广播公司，这最初只是一个笑话。 “我认为我们应该团结起来，也许只是创建一个平台。” 但在提供通过谷歌表格注册该运动的选项后，他收到了数以万计的回复。 这促使它成为一个严重的抗议团体，并于 7 月 9 日宣布将于 7 月 20 日向议会游行。德里有数万人参加。数百人还参加了孟买、班加罗尔和果阿等其他城市的抗议和烛光守夜活动。 由于著名工程师和活动家索南·旺楚克 (Sonam Wangchuk) 的遭遇，这次抗议活动变得更加重要。 6 月 28 日，他在简塔·曼塔天文台 (Jantar Mantar) 进行绝食抗议，以支持 CJP。简塔·曼塔天文台位于德里市中心，是一座拥有 300 年历史的天文台，这里经常发生抗议活动。 周六，这位 59 岁的人被强行送往医院，引发了 CJP 支持者的愤怒，并引起了人们对抗议运动的进一步关注。他在医院继续禁食。 蟑螂人民党（Cockroach Janta Party）的名称是为了回应印度首席大法官苏里亚·康德（Surya Kant）的评论而得名。 据称，在五月的一次法庭听证会上，他将转向新闻业和激进主义的失业年轻人比作蟑螂和寄生虫。 他后来澄清说，他特指的是拥有“假学位”的人，而不是更广泛的印度年轻人。 这个名字是对印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪 (Narendra Modi) 领导的印度人民党 (BJP) 的模仿，该党自 2014 年以来一直执政。 该运动的年轻志愿者从互联网上蔓延到现实生活中，他们打扮成蟑螂的样子出现在清理活动和抗议活动中。 印度人民党主要抗议印度教育体系存在的问题。 国家资格暨入学考试（NEET）是印度全国医学院入学的主要入学考试。 近 228 万名考生在 5 月 3 日参加了考试，他们为这份众所周知的难度很高的试卷学习了数月甚至数年的时间。然而，几天后，由于指控问题被泄露，该活动被取消。 这是一个很大的打击...

reflection.en: This story draws attention to wisdom, knowledge, and the pursuit of truth. Proverbs 2:6 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with humble learning and wise application, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到智慧、知识与追求真理。Proverbs 2:6提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以谦卑学习与智慧运用来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: If any of you lacks wisdom, you should ask God, who gives generously to all without finding fault.
verse.textZh: 你们中间若有缺少智慧的，应当求那厚赐与众人、也不斥责人的神，主就必赐给他。

title.en: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
title.zh: 特朗普威胁攻击地下核设施，美国再次对伊朗发动打击

summary.en: The US president's threat to target a key Iranian nuclear site came ahead of the 11th consecutive night of attacks.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
The US launched strikes on Iran for the 11th consecutive night late on Tuesday, as Tehran warned the US against targeting its nuclear facilities.

US Central Command (Centcom) said the wave of strikes were "designed to continue degrading Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping" in the Strait of Hormuz.

Iranian state media reported that air defences were activated in the capital Tehran. Explosions were also reported in the north-western city of Tabriz, the south-eastern ports of Chabahar and Konarak, and in the southern city of Bushehr, home to Iran's only nuclear power plant.

Iran, which has retaliated against the US and its Middle East allies, warned of reprisals after Donald Trump said the US would soon hit an underground nuclear site near Natanz.

Iran and the US agreed a ceasefire in April, but hostilities resumed last week as both countries battled over control of the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway.

Centcom said US forces had targeted Iranian military operations centres, maritime capabilities, aircraft hangars, drone storage facilities, and military logistics infrastructure.

It also accused Iran of attacking "more than 30 commercial vessels" passing through the Strait of Hormuz over the past three months.

"The unwarranted attacks have endangered hundreds of innocent mariners and undermined freedom of navigation," it said, adding the waterway remained "open for commercial vessel transit".

Kuwait's army said early on Wednesday morning that its air defences were engaging with drone attacks from Iran, while Bahrain and Jordan said they had also intercepted drone and missile strikes.

The price of oil has jumped in response to the latest escalation, reaching $94 on Wednesday.

US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has said Washington is still willing to engage in diplomacy with Tehran, but added that he did not believe Iran was serious about talks.

Earlier the US president said the next military target could be a complex known as Pickaxe Mountain , an underground nuclear site where Iran is suspected of building an undeclared enrichment facility.

"We'll be hitting that area pretty soon, and very heavily," Trump said, addressing reporters during a White House meeting with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun.

He added that he would not normally announce targets but "there's not a thing they can do about it".

Iran's Khatam Al-Anbiya military command said it would consider such an attack "as an expansion of war in the region", threatening strikes on "all the interests of America, the allies and supporters", state-run broadcaster IRIB reported.

Trump also threatened to "take care of" the Houthi rebels if the Iran-backed militant group in Yemen followed through on its threatened blockade of Saudi ports.

A Houthi media official had earlier said...
body.zh: 周二晚间，美国连续第 11 次对伊朗发动袭击，德黑兰警告美国不要针对其核设施。 美国中央司令部（Centcom）表示，这波袭击旨在“继续削弱伊朗威胁霍尔木兹海峡商业航运的能力”。 伊朗官方媒体报道称，首都德黑兰启动了防空系统。据报道，西北部城市大不里士、东南部港口恰巴哈尔和科纳拉克以及伊朗唯一核电站所在地的南部城市布什尔也发生爆炸。 在唐纳德·特朗普表示美国将很快袭击纳坦兹附近的地下核设施后，对美国及其中东盟友进行报复的伊朗警告称，将采取报复行动。 伊朗和美国于四月份同意停火，但上周两国为争夺重要的霍尔木兹海峡水道的控制权而展开敌对行动。 中央司令部表示，美军的目标是伊朗军事行动中心、海上能力、飞机库、无人机储存设施和军事后勤基础设施。 它还指责伊朗在过去三个月里袭击了通过霍尔木兹海峡的“30多艘商船”。 声明称：“无端袭击危及了数百名无辜海员，并破坏了航行自由。”并补充说，该水道仍然“对商船通行开放”。 科威特军队周三凌晨表示，其防空系统正在应对来自伊朗的无人机袭击，而巴林和约旦表示，他们也拦截了无人机和导弹袭击。 由于最近的升级，石油价格大幅上涨，周三达到 94 美元。 美国国务卿马可·卢比奥表示，华盛顿仍然愿意与德黑兰进行外交，但他补充说，他不认为伊朗认真对待谈判。 美国总统早些时候表示，下一个军事目标可能是一个名为镐山的综合体，这是一个地下核设施，伊朗怀疑在那里建造了一个未申报的浓缩设施。 特朗普在白宫与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩会面时对记者说：“我们很快就会对这个地区进行非常严厉的打击。” 他补充说，他通常不会宣布目标，但“他们对此无能为力”。 据国营广播公司 IRIB 报道，伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚军事指挥部表示，将把此类袭击视为“该地区战争的扩大”，并威胁对“美国、盟友和支持者的所有利益”进行打击。 特朗普还威胁说，如果伊朗支持的也门激进组织胡塞武装兑现其对沙特港口的封锁威胁，他将“照顾”胡塞叛军。 胡塞武装媒体官员早些时候表示...

reflection.en: This story draws attention to peace-making and restraint. Matthew 5:9 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with mercy, truth, and restraint, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到和平与克制。Matthew 5:9提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以怜悯、真实与节制来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
verse.textZh: 使人和睦的人有福了，因为他们必称为神的儿子。

title.en: Ukrainian drones hit more sites of Russian online retailer Wildberries
title.zh: 官员称，俄罗斯在线零售商Wildberries更多仓库遭乌克兰袭击

summary.en: Logistics hubs belonging to the Russian online retailer Wildberries in Krasnodar and Stavropol were reportedly struck overnight by Ukraine.
summary.zh: 据报道，俄罗斯在线零售商Wildberries位于克拉斯诺达尔和斯塔夫罗波尔的物流中心于周二夜间遭到乌克兰袭击。

body.en:
Ukrainian drones have hit warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer again, injuring 15 people, according to the company's founder and regional governors.

Logistics hubs run by Wildberries in two south-west cities were impacted by overnight attacks and workers evacuated, the founder said.

It is the second time Ukraine has attacked the firm's facilities in four days, with warehouses in Tambov and Elektrostal hit over the weekend, killing eight people.

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Wednesday that Ukraine had hit logistics hubs in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions "involved in providing the Russian army with drone components, navigation equipment and other gear".

Workers were evacuated after the attacks on logistics centres in Krasnodar and Nevinnomyssk in the Stavropol region, Wildberries founder Tatyana Kim said.

"There are no words to describe all the feelings and emotions caused by the attacks on ordinary people, on our employees, on us, who are simply doing our jobs," she wrote on Telegram. "But these situations demonstrate the most important thing: we must continue to do what we do for the benefit of people."

Five people were hurt in a warehouse complex on the outskirts of Nevinnomyssk, Governor Vladimir Vladimirov reported, with everyone receiving outpatient treatment.

In Krasnodar, ten people were injured in an attack on a warehouse complex, with three in a serious condition, the region's governor Veniamin Kondratyev said.

Reports of the strikes first emerged just after 00:00 GMT, with the Russian state news agency TASS reporting that air defences had been activated in Nevinnomyssk. Dramatic footage filmed by locals began to emerge shortly after.

In both locations, the impact appears substantial, with large fires engulfing the buildings and huge columns of smoke rising into the air.

Krasnodar's governor said the region was hit by a "massive attack last night", with drone debris also hitting the grounds of a company in Armavir and killing one employee. The city administration reported that an oil depot was struck, causing a fire.

Drone fragments also hit two apartment buildings in Krasnodar and two homes in the village of Dinskaya, Kondratyev said. There were no injuries.

Zelensky said Ukraine had struck an oil depot, as well as a tanker and four cargo ships of the Russian shadow fleet in the waters of the Sea of Azov and Black Sea.

Russia has been operating a "shadow fleet" to evade international sanctions imposed on its oil exports after its full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022.

The overnight strikes mark the second targeting of Wildberries' facilities in less than a week.

Recently published satellite imagery gives an indication of the damage caused to other Wildberries sites that were hit by...
body.zh: 据俄罗斯媒体和该地区州长称，乌克兰无人机再次袭击了俄罗斯最大在线零售商的仓库，造成 10 人受伤。 该公司所有者表示，该公司位于克拉斯诺达尔和斯塔夫罗波尔的物流中心在夜间罢工中遭到袭击，迫使工人撤离。 这是乌克兰四天内第二次袭击该公司的设施，周六坦波夫和埃莱克特罗斯塔尔的仓库遭到袭击，造成 8 人死亡、62 人受伤。 基辅声称这些仓库已被用来供应制造俄罗斯无人机和导航设备的零部件。 Wildberry 老板塔蒂亚娜·金 (Tatyana Kim) 在 Telegram 上表示，“普通人、我们的员工、我们这些只是在做我们工作的人受到攻击，所造成的所有感受和情绪是无法用语言来形容的。” “但这些情况表明了最重要的事情：我们必须继续为人民的利益做我们所做的事情。” 乌克兰安全与合作中心主席谢尔希·库赞(Serhii Kuzan)此前曾告诉BBC，俄罗斯志愿者曾利用Wildberry 的网站购买军事装备。 他说：“袭击 Wildberry 仓库的主要理由是扰乱俄罗斯的物流以及向俄罗斯军队和俄罗斯武器制造商供应军民两用商品、关键电子产品、受制裁商品等。” “此类袭击造成的附带损害还可能对俄罗斯经济产生严重影响，并对俄罗斯社会产生心理影响，并可能对战争的持续支持产生影响。”

reflection.en: News of continued strikes on infrastructure reminds us of the destructive nature of ongoing conflict and the temptation to respond to harm with further harm. Yahweh calls us not to be overcome by evil, but to actively seek ways to overcome evil with good, even amidst escalating tensions. This path, though challenging, is the only one that truly breaks...
reflection.zh: 持续袭击基础设施的消息提醒我们，冲突的破坏性本质以及以伤害回应伤害的诱惑。雅伟呼召我们不要被邪恶所胜，而要积极寻求以善胜恶的方式，即使在紧张局势升级之时。这条道路虽然充满挑战，却是真正打破暴力循环、迈向持久和平的唯一途径。

verse.textEn: Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
verse.textZh: 你不可为恶所胜，反要以善胜恶。

title.en: Turkey-PKK talks: Is peace finally possible?
title.zh: 土耳其与库尔德工人党会谈：和平最终可能吗？

summary.en: A year ago, the Kurdish militant group PKK announced an end to its armed struggle. Since then, peace talks with Turkey have progressed slowly, but some observers believe they could succeed.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及盼望、忍耐与重建。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
A year ago, the Kurdish militant group PKK announced an end to its armed struggle. Since then, peace talks with Turkey have progressed slowly, but some observers believe they could succeed.

July marks a year since the Kurdish militant group known as the PKK, listed as a terrorist organization by numerous countries,  symbolically burned their weapons.

Last May, the PKK, or Kurdistan Workers' Party, announced it would end its "work under the name of PKK," halting a decades-long armed insurgency between the Turkish state and those fighting for Kurdish rights or independence inside Turkey, one that had cost an estimated 40,000 lives.

Later, on July 11, a group of around 30 PKK fighters in northern Iraq burned their weapons in a symbolic disarmament ceremony.

This year, on that same date, human rights activists, academics and politicians gathered in Diyarbakir, the largest city in Turkey's Kurdish-majority southeast, to assess progress in the ongoing peace process between the Turkish government and the PKK.

The conference was organized by Diyarbakir's administration and the Human Rights Association, or IHD.

One of the IHD's co-chairs, lawyer Cihan Aydin, has proposed making July 11 an official day of remembrance. A vibrant culture of remembrance contributes to coming to terms with the past and prevents future conflicts, he argued. Aydin also called for a legal solution for all those impacted by the peace process, including PKK leader Abdullah Ocalan, who has been jailed by Turkey since 1999. 

For decades, Ocalan was considered a terrorist in Turkey . Today the 77-year-old is the focal point of the current peace process. It was he who called on the PKK to lay down its arms in February 2025, a call that members responded to.

Following this, the Turkish parliament established a committee that heard testimony from approximately 140 representatives of politics and civil society, including human rights activists and relatives of soldiers, veterans and prisoners. The committee then recommended a series of reforms to advance the peace process, including the reintegration into society of PKK members who renounced violence, as well as state security institutions verifying that the PKK had genuinely given up its weapons.

Talks have focused on the rules on the return or potential prosecution of PKK members as well as their possible integration into civilian and political life. The Kurds want to see Ocalan released from prison along with other political prisoners.

The Turkish government has not been open to a general amnesty, only a partial one, and has yet to make any concrete commitment regarding Ocalan . However, more recently the country's ruling party, AKP, seems to have struck a more moderate tone.

This makes Aret Demirci,...
body.zh: 一年前，库尔德武装组织库尔德工人党宣布结束武装斗争。此后，与土耳其的和谈进展缓慢，但一些观察家认为谈判可能取得成功。 7 月是被许多国家列为恐怖组织的库尔德武装组织库尔德工人党象征性焚烧武器一周年。 去年五月，库尔德工人党（PKK）宣布将结束“以库尔德工人党名义开展的工作”，制止土耳其政府与土耳其境内争取库尔德人权利或独立的人士之间长达数十年的武装叛乱，这场叛乱导致估计有 4 万人丧生。 随后，7月11日，伊拉克北部约30名库尔德工人党武装分子举行了象征性的解除武装仪式，焚烧了武器。 今年同一天，人权活动人士、学者和政治家齐聚迪亚巴克尔（土耳其库尔德人占多数的东南部最大城市），评估土耳其政府与库尔德工人党之间正在进行的和平进程的进展情况。 这次会议是由迪亚巴克尔政府和人权协会（IHD）组织的。 IHD 的联合主席之一 Cihan Aydin 律师提议将 7 月 11 日定为正式纪念日。他认为，充满活力的纪念文化有助于接受过去并防止未来的冲突。艾登还呼吁为所有受和平进程影响的人提供法律解决方案，其中包括自 1999 年以来一直被土耳其监禁的库尔德工人党领导人阿卜杜拉·奥贾兰。 几十年来，奥贾兰在土耳其被视为恐怖分子。如今，这位 77 岁的老人是当前和平进程的焦点。正是他于 2025 年 2 月呼吁库尔德工人党放下武器，成员们响应了这一呼吁。 此后，土耳其议会成立了一个委员会，听取了大约 140 名政界和民间社会代表的证词，其中包括人权活动人士以及士兵、退伍军人和囚犯的亲属。该委员会随后建议进行一系列改革以推进和平进程，包括让放弃暴力的库尔德工人党成员重新融入社会，以及由国家安全机构核实库尔德工人党是否真正放弃了武器。 会谈的重点是库尔德工人党成员的遣返或可能受到起诉的规则，以及他们融入平民和政治生活的可能性。库尔德人希望看到奥贾兰与其他政治犯一起出狱。 土耳其政府尚未对全面特赦持开放态度，仅进行部分特赦，并且尚未对奥贾兰做出任何具体承诺。然而，最近该国执政党正义与发展党似乎采取了更为温和的语气。 这使得阿雷特·德米尔奇……

reflection.en: This story draws attention to hope, endurance, and faithful rebuilding. Romans 12:12 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with steady hope and perseverance, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到盼望、忍耐与重建。Romans 12:12提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以坚定盼望与忍耐来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: We also glory in our sufferings, because we know that suffering produces perseverance; perseverance, character; and character, hope.
verse.textZh: 就是在患难中也是欢欢喜喜的；因为知道患难生忍耐，忍耐生老练，老练生盼望。

title.en: 'Strong concerns': Australia meets with China following ballistic missile test
title.zh: “强烈关切”：澳大利亚在中国弹道导弹试验后与中方会晤

summary.en: Australia's Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart, expressing "strong concerns" and reiterating the importance of transparency following a recent ballistic missile test.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚外交部长黄英贤与中国外长举行会晤，对近期弹道导弹试验表达了“强烈关切”，并重申了透明度的重要性。

body.en:
Australia has raised its concerns with China over its nuclear-capable missile test in the South Pacific, noting many of the region's nations also shared the same view.

Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart, Wang Yi, on the sidelines of ASEAN talks in the Philippines capital, Manila, on Tuesday evening.

"You speak about the importance of mutual understanding. I agree, and I expect we will discuss our concerns ... including around peace and stability in our region, safe and professional military conduct, and the importance of transparency and reassurance of intent," Wong said in opening remarks.

Wong noted the "strong concerns" expressed by many Pacific Island countries about the submarine-launched missile earlier in July.

The two foreign ministers also discussed the importance of peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

"You've often heard me say that we will cooperate where we can and disagree where we must, and we want to continue to engage because we believe that is in our national interest," Wong said.

Australia was only given a few hours' notice by China of the test, which was launched within hours of Prime Minister Anthony Albanese signing a new defence alliance with Fiji.

Albanese slammed the launch as a "provocative act" while other Pacific nations including New Zealand, Tuvalu and Fiji condemned the incident.

Solomon Islands Prime Minister Matthew Wale was standing beside his Australian counterpart in his country's capital Honiara in early July when he said the test was "not the act of a friend".

Albanese has previously flagged a strong statement would be issued by the Pacific Islands Forum, but the group's disagreement on the wording of the text has resulted in a delay.

A foreign ministers' meeting of the forum will be held in August, where the issue is likely to be discussed.

body.zh: 澳大利亚就中国在南太平洋进行的核导弹试验向中国表达了担忧，并指出该地区许多国家也持有同样的观点。 周二晚上，外交部长黄英贤在菲律宾首都马尼拉举行的东盟会谈期间会见了中国外交部长王毅。 黄在开场白中表示：“你谈到了相互理解的重要性。我同意，并且我希望我们能够讨论我们所关心的问题……包括我们地区的和平与稳定、安全和专业的军事行为，以及透明度和保证意图的重要性。” 黄指出，许多太平洋岛国7月初对潜射导弹表达了“强烈担忧”。 两国外长还讨论了印太地区和平与稳定的重要性。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 黄说：“你们经常听我说，我们将在能够合作的地方合作，在必须反对的地方反对，我们希望继续参与，因为我们相信这符合我们的国家利益。” 中国仅在几个小时内向澳大利亚发出了此次试验的通知，此次试验是在澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴内塞与斐济签署新的防务联盟后数小时内启动的。 阿尔巴内斯抨击这次发射是“挑衅行为”，而新西兰、图瓦卢和斐济等其他太平洋国家则谴责这一事件。 7月初，所罗门群岛总理马修·威尔在首都霍尼亚拉站在澳大利亚总理旁边，他表示这次测试“不是朋友的行为”。 阿尔巴内塞此前曾表示太平洋岛屿论坛将发表一份强硬声明，但该组织对文本措辞的分歧导致了这一声明的推迟。 论坛外长会议将于8月举行，届时可能会讨论这一问题。 如需了解 SBS 新闻的最新动态，请下载我们的应用程序并订阅我们的时事通讯。

reflection.en: In the wake of a ballistic missile test, diplomatic efforts to ensure transparency reflect a commitment to de-escalation and peaceful coexistence. Yahweh's word encourages us to pursue peace with all, as far as it depends on us, even amidst challenging international relations. Such dialogue, though difficult, is vital for fostering stability and...
reflection.zh: 在弹道导弹试验之后，旨在确保透明度的外交努力体现了对缓和局势与和平共处的承诺。雅伟的话语鼓励我们，只要力所能及，就要与所有人和平相处，即使在充满挑战的国际关系中也是如此。这种对话，尽管艰难，但对于促进国家间的稳定和理解至关重要。

verse.textEn: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
verse.textZh: 若是能行，总要尽力与众人和睦。

title.en: 'Business-friendly socialism': What are new UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham's policies?
title.zh: “商业友好型社会主义”：英国新首相安迪·伯纳姆的政策是什么？

summary.en: The United Kingdom's new prime minister, Andy Burnham, has outlined his policy agenda, which includes measures such as energy cuts, rent controls, and approaches to Brexit.
summary.zh: 英国新首相安迪·伯纳姆概述了他的政策议程，其中包括能源削减、租金管制以及脱欧方针等措施。

body.en:
Andy Burnham, sworn in this week as the United Kingdom's seventh prime minister in a decade, has opened his tenure with a slew of new policies, branding his own political ideology as "business-friendly socialism".

Burnham was sworn in as the UK's new prime minister on Monday, replacing Keir Starmer, who resigned following months of pressure from his own MPs after just over two years in the job.

The former Greater Manchester mayor, nicknamed the 'King of the North' for his defence of the region during his nine-year stint as mayor, used his first days in office to signal a new leftward shift for the Labour government.

On his first full day, Burnham told the inaugural meeting of his cabinet that he would lead a "cost of living government".

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Burnham has branded his political ideology "business-friendly socialism" — with a distinct focus on cost of living measures.

He has unveiled some early policies designed "to do some things that people will feel and feel quite quickly", especially those on the lowest incomes — adding that a longer-term plan would be set out later in the year.

On Tuesday, Burnham announced he will cut taxes on electricity bills — one of the main drivers of the UK's cost of living crisis — in his first move to ease pressures that have angered the public and helped stoke political instability.

Burnham said his government would remove the value-added tax from domestic electricity bills from 1 October, cutting about £45 ($86) from the average annual bill of about £1,860 ($3,554) that households pay.

"We're taking immediate action to cut taxes on energy bills, put more money in people's pockets and bring back hope," Burnham said in a statement, having pledged to give people more "breathing space" in their lives.

The government said it would be funded by cancelling Starmer's plan for a digital ID scheme that would have cost the taxpayer £1.8 billion ($3.44 billion) — but former minister Darren Jones said the ID program had been "unfunded".

The energy announcement is designed to show that Burnham will move quickly to improve living standards after years of stagnation.

He said on Monday his early policies might not "take all of the pressure off" people struggling with rising prices, and that his 10-year plan will be unveiled later this year.

During his first speech as prime minister on Monday, Burnham also said his first ambition was to end rough sleeping in the UK.

He is reportedly considering rent control measures, alongside plans to build more public housing to help bring down welfare spending.

Burnham has pledged to re-industrialise the...
body.zh: 安迪·伯纳姆本周宣誓就任英国十年来第七位首相，他以一系列新政策开启了自己的任期，将自己的政治意识形态称为“商业友好型社会主义”。 伯纳姆于周一宣誓就任英国新首相，接替基尔·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）。后者在上任仅两年多后，就在自己国会议员数月的压力下辞职。 这位前大曼彻斯特市长因在担任市长九年期间捍卫该地区而被昵称为“北方之王”，他在上任的第一天就向工党政府发出了新的左倾信号。 在他上任的第一天，伯纳姆在内阁首次会议上表示，他将领导一个“生活成本政府”。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 伯纳姆将他的政治意识形态称为“商业友好型社会主义”——特别关注生活成本措施。 他公布了一些早期政策，旨在“做一些人们会很快感受到的事情”，特别是那些收入最低的人，并补充说，将在今年晚些时候制定一项长期计划。 伯纳姆周二宣布，他将削减电费税——电费是英国生活成本危机的主要驱动因素之一——这是他为缓解激怒公众并加剧政治不稳定压力而采取的第一步举措。 伯纳姆表示，他的政府将从 10 月 1 日起取消家庭电费中的增值税，从而将家庭每年支付的平均电费约 1,860 英镑（3,554 美元）削减约 45 英镑（86 美元）。 伯纳姆在一份声明中表示：“我们正在立即采取行动，削减能源费用税，让更多的钱进入人们的口袋，带回希望。”他承诺为人们的生活提供更多的“喘息空间”。 政府表示，将通过取消斯塔默的数字身份识别计划来为其提供资金，该计划将花费纳税人 18 亿英镑（34.4 亿美元），但前部长达伦·琼斯表示，该身份识别计划“没有资金支持”。 能源公告旨在表明伯纳姆在经历多年的停滞后将迅速采取行动提高生活水平。 他周一表示，他的早期政策可能无法“减轻”那些与物价上涨作斗争的人们的所有压力，他的十年计划将于今年晚些时候公布。 伯纳姆在周一作为首相的首次演讲中还表示，他的首要目标是结束英国的露宿生活。 据报道，他正在考虑采取租金管制措施，同时计划建造更多公共住房以帮助减少福利支出。 伯纳姆承诺重新工业化......

reflection.en: As a new prime minister outlines policies ranging from energy cuts to rent controls, the call to act justly and love mercy becomes paramount. Effective governance requires leaders to consider the impact of their decisions on all citizens, especially the vulnerable. May Yahweh grant wisdom and integrity to those in authority as they strive to serve their...
reflection.zh: 随着新首相概述从能源削减到租金管制等各项政策，秉行公义、喜爱怜悯的呼召变得至关重要。有效的治理要求领导者考虑其决策对所有公民，特别是弱势群体的影响。愿雅伟赐予执政者智慧和正直，使他们努力为国家服务。

verse.textEn: What does Yahweh require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
verse.textZh: 雅伟向你所要的是什么呢？只要你行公义，好怜悯，存谦卑的心，与你的神同行。

title.en: Flights to return after 40-year hiatus as Trump promises to help Lebanon 'a lot'
title.zh: 航班在中断40年后恢复，特朗普承诺“大力”帮助黎巴嫩

summary.en: Flights between Lebanon and Israel are set to resume after a 40-year suspension. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun stated his objective is a complete Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩与以色列之间的航班将在中断40年后恢复。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩表示，他的目标是让以色列完全撤出黎巴嫩领土。

body.en:
United States President Donald Trump vowed on Wednesday to help Lebanon "a lot" as its president, Joseph Aoun, sought the US' backing for a fragile effort to disarm Hezbollah and forge a path to peace with Israel.

Meeting Aoun at the White House, Trump said Lebanon had been "a very mistreated country" that had been "hit hard" for decades.

"It's probably a dangerous place in a lot of ways," Trump told reporters. "But they love the country ... and we're going to help it. We're going to help it a lot."

Aoun, the first Lebanese president invited to Washington since 2009, asked Trump for political support and continued backing for the Lebanese army, which has begun deploying in southern areas under a US-backed framework agreement with Israel.

"We need to support the LAF," Aoun said, referring to the Lebanese Armed Forces. "Without the LAF, everything will collapse."

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Aoun's nearly two-hour visit took place as Israeli troops continue to occupy a swath of the country's south and hundreds of thousands of Lebanese remain displaced following Israeli strikes. Hezbollah has rejected the government's direct talks with Israel as well as efforts by the state to disarm it.

The talks highlighted Aoun's delicate balancing act — seeking Trump's help to secure an Israeli withdrawal from southern Lebanon while simultaneously facing pressure from the US and Israel to disarm Hezbollah, which remains a formidable fighting force despite recent setbacks.

The Lebanese president, a former army commander, said the military was "the backbone of security and stability" and the country's most trusted institution.

In a statement after the talks, the Lebanese presidency said Aoun stressed to Trump the "urgent need for a complete Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory," calling it "an essential step to consolidate stability and enable the Lebanese state to extend its full sovereignty exclusively through its own forces."

Following his meeting with Aoun, Trump said he would direct his administration to allow all US airline carriers to fly directly to Lebanon— a historic policy shift more than 40 years in the making.

US flights were suspended in 1985 after the hijacking of TWA Flight 847 from Athens, Greece, en route to Rome, Italy, that was forced to land in Beirut. During the 17-day ordeal, a US Navy diver was brutally killed.

The Federal Aviation Administration and Transportation Department did not immediately comment.

Trump's visit came as the Lebanese army moved into an area of the south under a deal with Israel aimed at proving Lebanon can extend state authority and disarm Iran-backed Hezbollah.

But in a sign of the...
body.zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周三发誓要“大力”帮助黎巴嫩，因为黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩正在寻求美国的支持，以解除真主党武装并与以色列建立和平之路。 特朗普在白宫会见奥恩时表示，黎巴嫩是“一个受到严重虐待的国家”，几十年来一直受到“沉重打击”。 特朗普对记者说：“从很多方面来说，这可能是一个危险的地方。” “但他们热爱这个国家……我们会帮助它。我们会提供很多帮助。” 奥恩是自 2009 年以来第一位受邀访问华盛顿的黎巴嫩总统，他请求特朗普提供政治支持并继续支持黎巴嫩军队。根据美国支持的与以色列的框架协议，黎巴嫩军队已开始在南部地区部署。 “我们需要支持黎巴嫩武装部队，”奥恩说，他指的是黎巴嫩武装部队。 “如果没有 LAF，一切都会崩溃。” 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 奥恩进行近两个小时的访问之际，以色列军队继续占领该国南部大片地区，数十万黎巴嫩人在以色列袭击后仍然流离失所。真主党拒绝了政府与以色列的直接谈判以及该国解除武装的努力。 会谈凸显了奥恩微妙的平衡行为——寻求特朗普的帮助以确保以色列从黎巴嫩南部撤军，同时面临美国和以色列要求解除真主党武装的压力，尽管真主党最近遭遇挫折，但它仍然是一支强大的战斗力量。 这位曾担任陆军指挥官的黎巴嫩总统表示，军队是“安全与稳定的支柱”，也是该国最值得信赖的机构。 黎巴嫩总统府在会谈后的一份声明中表示，奥恩向特朗普强调“迫切需要以色列从黎巴嫩领土上完全撤军”，称这是“巩固稳定并使黎巴嫩国家能够完全通过自己的军队完全行使主权的重要一步”。 与奥恩会面后，特朗普表示，他将指示政府允许所有美国航空公司直飞黎巴嫩——这是 40 多年来酝酿的历史性政策转变。 1985 年，环球航空 847 号航班从希腊雅典飞往意大利罗马途中被劫持，被迫降落在贝鲁特，随后美国航班暂停。在长达17天的磨难中，一名美国海军潜水员惨遭杀害。 美国联邦航空管理局和运输部没有立即发表评论。 特朗普访问之际，黎巴嫩军队根据与以色列达成的一项协议进入南部地区，旨在证明黎巴嫩可以扩大国家权力并解除伊朗支持的真主党的武装。 但有一个迹象表明...

reflection.en: The resumption of flights after decades of silence offers a small sign that long-standing walls of hostility can begin to crumble. While deep political divisions remain, Yahweh's desire is for peace that breaks down barriers between peoples. This reminds us that even small steps towards connection can challenge entrenched separation.
reflection.zh: 航班在数十年的中断后恢复，这提供了一个微小的迹象，表明长期存在的敌意之墙可以开始瓦解。尽管深刻的政治分歧依然存在，但雅伟渴望打破人与人之间隔阂的和平。这提醒我们，即使是迈向连接的一小步，也能挑战根深蒂固的分离。

verse.textEn: For he himself is our peace, who has made the two groups one and has destroyed the barrier, the dividing wall of hostility.
verse.textZh: 因他使我们和睦，将两下合而为一，拆毁了中间隔断的墙。

title.en: 'It's really going to hurt': The oil route helping keep prices down is now under threat
title.zh: “真的会很痛”：帮助抑制油价的石油运输路线现在面临威胁

summary.en: If Yemen's Houthi rebels successfully blockade Saudi Arabian ships, global oil supplies could come under more pressure.
summary.zh: 如果也门胡塞叛军成功封锁沙特阿拉伯船只，全球石油供应可能会面临更大压力。

body.en:
There are concerns global energy supplies could be crippled and oil prices spike even further after Yemen's Houthi rebels opened up a new front in the US-Israeli war on Iran by vowing to impose a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia.

And it could put added pressure on the Albanese government to extend the fuel excise discount — which is due to end on 2 August.

Energy supplies have already been stifled by volatility in the Strait of Hormuz — now at the centre of a continuing war that was originally intended by the US and Israel in February to target any Iranian nuclear weapon capability.

Though it's not clear how the Houthis would carry out their campaign against Saudi Arabia, it threatens to disrupt shipping in the Red Sea , through which the Saudis have been exporting millions of barrels of oil.

Lurion de Mello, a senior lecturer in applied finance at Macquarie University, said oil prices, especially diesel, could take a hit.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

"Saudi Arabia has been pumping quite a fair bit of oil, and exporting it through its ports in the Red Sea, and this oil has been making its way all the way to China and also into refineries into Asia," he told SBS News.

"So this threat, I think it's really going to hurt the supply coming out of Saudi Arabia, and I think definitely will have an uptick on the oil price."

The Yemeni militant group has been fighting guerrilla wars against the Saudi-backed Yemeni government for years. It is aligned with Iran, which considers the Houthis as part of its regional "Axis of Resistance", though the Houthis deny being an Iranian proxy and say they develop their own weapons.

It is not clear how far the group's new blockade campaign stems from its own strategic priorities or is being made on Iran's behalf.

A long-running conflict between the Houthis and the Saudis flared up again last week, when Yemen's internationally recognised government said it had struck Sanaa airport to stop an Iranian plane landing.

The Houthis said Saudi Arabia was responsible and in response fired missiles at Abha airport in the kingdom's mountainous southwest.

Yemen sits on the Bab al-Mandab Strait — the southern gateway to the Red Sea — and closing that would open up a new front in the energy crisis and Iran's overarching conflict with the US.

The strait has emerged as a much-needed alternative to the Strait of Hormuz for global oil flows, with more than seven million barrels per day transiting the strait in June, up from roughly four million barrels before the Iran war.

Following Iran's partial blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Saudi Arabia responded by diverting more than 70 per cent of...
body.zh: 也门胡塞叛军誓言对沙特阿拉伯实施海上封锁，在美以对伊朗战争中开辟了新战线，人们担心全球能源供应可能受到削弱，油价进一步飙升。 这可能会给阿尔巴尼亚政府带来更大的压力，要求其延长燃油消费税折扣——该折扣将于 8 月 2 日结束。 能源供应已经因霍尔木兹海峡的动荡而受到抑制——现在正处于一场持续战争的中心，这场战争最初是美国和以色列在二月份打算针对伊朗的任何核武器能力。 尽管尚不清楚胡塞武装将如何针对沙特阿拉伯开展行动，但它可能会扰乱红海的航运，而沙特一直通过红海出口数百万桶石油。 麦考瑞大学应用金融高级讲师卢里昂·德梅洛表示，石油价格，尤其是柴油价格可能会受到打击。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 他告诉SBS新闻：“沙特阿拉伯一直在开采相当多的石油，并通过红海港口出口，这些石油一直运往中国，也进入亚洲的炼油厂。” “因此，我认为这种威胁确实会损害沙特阿拉伯的供应，而且我认为肯定会导致油价上涨。” 也门武装组织多年来一直与沙特支持的也门政府进行游击战。它与伊朗结盟，伊朗将胡塞武装视为其地区“抵抗轴心”的一部分，尽管胡塞武装否认自己是伊朗的代理人，并称他们开发自己的武器。 目前尚不清楚该组织的新封锁行动在多大程度上是出于其自身的战略优先事项，还是代表伊朗进行的。 胡塞武装和沙特之间的长期冲突上周再次爆发，当时国际公认的也门政府表示，它袭击了萨那机场以阻止一架伊朗飞机降落。 胡塞武装称沙特阿拉伯应对此负责，并向该国西南部山区的艾卜哈机场发射了导弹作为回应。 也门位于曼德海峡——通往红海的南部门户——关闭该海峡将为能源危机和伊朗与美国的总体冲突开辟一条新战线。 该海峡已成为全球石油流动急需的霍尔木兹海峡替代品，6月份每天通过该海峡的石油量超过700万桶，高于伊朗战争前的约400万桶。 伊朗部分封锁霍尔木兹海峡后，沙特阿拉伯做出回应，转移了超过 70% 的海峡……

reflection.en: The news of potential blockades threatening global oil supplies can stir anxiety about economic stability and rising costs. In such moments of uncertainty and fear about what "really will hurt," Yahweh reminds us not to be dismayed, promising His strengthening presence and help. This offers a steadfast hope that even amidst global pressures, we are not left...
reflection.zh: 有关潜在封锁威胁全球石油供应的消息，可能引发人们对经济稳定和物价上涨的担忧。在面对这种可能“真的会很痛”的不确定和恐惧时，雅伟提醒我们不要惊惶，应许祂会加添力量并帮助我们。这在面对全球压力时提供了一个坚定的盼望，即我们并非独自面对挑战。

verse.textEn: So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
verse.textZh: 你不要害怕，因为我与你同在；不要惊惶，因为我是你的神。

title.en: Jordan faces growing risk of becoming latest frontline state in US-Iran conflict
title.zh: 约旦面临成为美伊冲突最新前线国家的日益增长的风险

summary.en: Jordan is increasingly becoming a direct participant in the escalating Middle East conflict, facing intensified attacks from Iranian forces. The Hashemite Kingdom is now seen as a new frontline in the regional tensions.
summary.zh: 随着伊朗袭击的加剧，约旦正日益成为不断扩大的中东冲突中的最新前线国家。这个哈希姆王国现在被视为地区紧张局势中的一个新战场。

body.en:
As Iranian attacks intensify, Jordan is emerging as the latest frontline state in the widening Middle East conflict. Why is the Hashemite Kingdom a target for Tehran?

Air raid sirens again sounded in parts of Jordan  early Tuesday as Iranian missiles targeted the kingdom.

"The air defense system intercepted and downed tonight three missiles coming from Iranian territory that entered Jordanian airspace and targeted the kingdom's territory," the army said in a statement.

No injuries were reported, but the latest strikes follow a series of attacks that have raised the stakes for one of the  United States' closest Arab allies in the past days: Two US service members were killed and around 30 others injured by an Iranian missile strike on a US base in Jordan last week.

Jordan is one of the eight Arab countries that host permanent US military facilities. Some of the other host countries — particularly the Gulf states — have been the  targets of Iranian attacks since the United States and Israel   launched joint attacks on Iran in late February.

Though  Iran  launched missiles toward Jordan shortly thereafter, there has since been a lull in direct attacks on the kingdom, which has helped to intercept Iranian missiles launched toward Israel, arguing that it is acting in defense of its own airspace. 

" Iran  has reserved itself the right to return fire on any state in the region that hosts US military assets or bases, and Jordan is one of them," Erwin van Veen, a senior research fellow at the Clingendael Institute in The Hague, told DW. "Only the options of Jordan's King Abdullah II are quite limited as Jordan is in a very precarious balance with respect to military and economic dependence on the Americans."

On Sunday, in a first diplomatic escalation, Jordan summoned Iran's top diplomat in Amman to demand an immediate end to what the foreign ministry called "unjustified and blatant Iranian attacks."

The US is Jordan's largest single foreign supporter. Under a seven-year Memorandum of Understanding signed in 2022, Washington agreed to provide $1.45 billion (€1.27bn) annually in economic and military assistance. In 2025, Congress increased this to $1.65 billion, which was triple the amount from 2010.

Furthermore, a Defense Cooperation Agreement signed in January 2021 grants US forces formalized access to Jordanian military facilities. According to a recent report , there are currently 4,000 US troops, more than in previous years, stationed in Jordan.

In March, however, Jordanian Foreign Minister Ayman Safadi insisted that there were no foreign military bases in the country. Kelly Petillo, program manager for Middle East and North Africa at the European Council on...
body.zh: 随着伊朗袭击加剧，约旦正在成为不断扩大的中东冲突的最新前线国家。为什么哈希姆王国成为德黑兰的目标？ 周二早些时候，伊朗导弹瞄准约旦，约旦部分地区再次拉响空袭警报。 军方在一份声明中表示：“防空系统今晚拦截并击落了三枚来自伊朗领土的导弹，这些导弹进入约旦领空并瞄准该王国领土。” 没有人员伤亡的报道，但最近的袭击是在过去几天发生的一系列袭击事件之后发生的，这些袭击增加了美国最亲密的阿拉伯盟友之一的风险：上周伊朗导弹袭击了美国驻约旦基地，造成两名美国军人死亡，约 30 人受伤。 约旦是拥有美国永久军事设施的八个阿拉伯国家之一。自二月底美国和以色列对伊朗发动联合袭击以来，其他一些东道国，尤其是海湾国家，一直是伊朗袭击的目标。 尽管伊朗此后不久就向约旦发射了导弹，但此后对约旦的直接攻击已经暂停，这有助于拦截伊朗向以色列发射的导弹，认为这是为了保卫自己的领空。 海牙克林根达尔研究所高级研究员欧文·范维恩对德国之声表示：“伊朗保留向该地区任何拥有美国军事资产或基地的国家进行还击的权利，约旦就是其中之一。” “只有约旦国王阿卜杜拉二世的选择相当有限，因为约旦在军事和经济上对美国的依赖处于非常不稳定的平衡。” 周日，在首次外交升级中，约旦召见伊朗驻安曼高级外交官，要求立即停止外交部所说的“伊朗不公正和公然的袭击”。 美国是约旦最大的单一外国支持者。根据 2022 年签署的为期七年的谅解备忘录，华盛顿同意每年提供 14.5 亿美元（12.7 亿欧元）的经济和军事援助。 2025 年，国会将这一数额增加到 16.5 亿美元，是 2010 年的三倍。 此外，2021 年 1 月签署的国防合作协议允许美军正式进入约旦军事设施。据最新报道，目前驻约旦美军有4000人，比往年多。 然而，三月份，约旦外交部长艾曼·萨法迪坚称该国没有外国军事基地。凯利·佩蒂略 (Kelly Petillo)，欧洲理事会中东和北非项目经理

reflection.en: As regional conflicts expand and draw more nations into their orbit, it can feel as though peace is an ever-receding hope. Yet, Psalm 46:9 reminds us that Yahweh ultimately has the power to make wars cease across the earth. This enduring promise offers solace and a vision of a future where even the most entrenched conflicts find their end.
reflection.zh: 当地区冲突不断扩大，将更多国家卷入其中时，和平似乎成为一个遥不可及的希望。然而，诗篇46:9提醒我们，雅伟最终有能力使战争止息，直到地极。这个持久的应许为我们提供了慰藉，并描绘了一个即使是最根深蒂固的冲突也能终结的未来。

verse.textEn: He makes wars cease to the ends of the earth; he breaks the bow and shatters the spear.
verse.textZh: 他止息刀兵，直到地极；他折弓断枪。

title.en: China narrows AI gap, challenges US influence
title.zh: 中国缩小人工智能差距，挑战美国影响力

summary.en: At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, Beijing showcased advances in AI while promoting its vision of open-source development and global governance.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自全球栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, Beijing showcased advances in AI while promoting its vision of open-source development and global governance.

As China narrows the artificial intelligence (AI) gap with the United States,  Beijing is promoting a narrative centered on "open source" and "inclusive AI" as an argument for its vision of global governance.

During his keynote speech at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai on Friday, Chinese President Xi Jinping expressed China's ambition to take a leading role in setting global standards in AI . He criticized what he described as the "overextension of the concept of national security."

Xi did not openly reference the United States. However, Beijing's effort to position itself as an advocate of a new AI order and challenge US dominance was unmistakable.

This year's Shanghai summit sent several important signals, says Rogier Creemers, assistant professor at Leiden University in the Netherlands specializing in China's digital technology policy. The WAIC indicates that artificial intelligence is now one of Beijing's political priorities, and that China intends to compete with the United States by supporting open-source AI models and promoting AI-driven industrialization, Creemers told DW. He also noted China hopes to win support from countries in the Global South for this effort.

China is steadily narrowing the gap with the United States in AI model development, and its efforts at AI application in industrial processes are slowly maturing. 

Chinese AI model developers have continued to keep pace on the global stage, largely by training open-weight models on limited but advanced computer hardware, Paul Triolo, senior vice president for China and tech policy lead at DGA-Albright Stonebridge Group, told DW.

Triolo believes deployment of AI across Chinese enterprises may be progressing faster than in the United States.

In addition, there is less fear of AI among the Chinese population than there is in the US, facilitating more rapid uptake of AI applications at the consumer level.

Earlier this year, Chinese state media claimed that the performance gap between Chinese and US AI models had "largely disappeared."

Several experts broadly agreed with this assessment, saying that certain benchmark tests of China's  large language models (LLMs) such as GLM-5.2 and Kimi K3 showed the gap narrowing or even fully closing.

For most applications, Triolo noted, China's leading open-weight AI models are cheaper to run and more than capable of handling most tasks.

At the same time, advanced proprietary models from leading US companies such as Anthropic, OpenAI  and Google still retain advantages in areas such as...
body.zh: 在上海举行的世界人工智能大会上，北京展示了人工智能的进步，同时宣传其开源发展和全球治理的愿景。 随着中国缩小与美国的人工智能 (AI) 差距，北京正在推动以“开源”和“包容性人工智能”为中心的叙事，作为其全球治理愿景的论据。 中国国家主席习近平周五在上海举行的世界人工智能大会（WAIC）上发表主旨演讲时表达了中国在制定人工智能全球标准方面发挥主导作用的雄心。他批评他所说的“国家安全概念的过度延伸”。 习近平没有公开提及美国。 然而，北京将自己定位为人工智能新秩序倡导者并挑战美国主导地位的努力是明确无误的。 荷兰莱顿大学专门研究中国数字技术政策的助理教授罗吉尔·克里默斯表示，今年的上海峰会发出了几个重要信号。 Creemers 告诉德国之声，WAIC 表明人工智能现在是北京的政治优先事项之一，中国打算通过支持开源人工智能模型和促进人工智能驱动的工业化来与美国竞争。他还指出，中国希望为此赢得南方国家的支持。 中国在人工智能模型开发方面与美国的差距正在稳步缩小，人工智能在工业流程中的应用也正在慢慢成熟。 DGA-Albright Stonebridge Group 中国区高级副总裁兼技术政策负责人 Paul Triolo 告诉德国之声，中国人工智能模型开发人员继续在全球舞台上保持同步，主要是在有限但先进的计算机硬件上训练开放权重模型。 Triolo 认为，中国企业的人工智能部署进展可能比美国更快。 此外，中国民众对人工智能的恐惧程度低于美国民众，这有助于消费者更快速地接受人工智能应用。 今年早些时候，中国官方媒体声称中国和美国人工智能模型之间的性能差距已经“基本消失”。 多位专家普遍同意这一评估，并表示，GLM-5.2和Kimi K3等中国大型语言模型（LLM）的某些基准测试表明，差距正在缩小甚至完全缩小。 Triolo 指出，对于大多数应用程序来说，中国领先的开放式人工智能模型的运行成本更低，并且能够处理大多数任务。 与此同时，Anthropic、OpenAI 和 Google 等美国领先公司的先进专有模型仍然在以下领域保持优势……

reflection.en: This story draws attention to peace-making and restraint. Matthew 5:9 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with mercy, truth, and restraint, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到和平与克制。Matthew 5:9提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以怜悯、真实与节制来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
verse.textZh: 使人和睦的人有福了，因为他们必称为神的儿子。

title.en: How India's youth-led 'Cockroach' movement challenges Modi
title.zh: 印度青年主导的“蟑螂”运动如何挑战莫迪

summary.en: A satirical protest in India against exam leaks has evolved into a significant youth-led movement. This movement now expresses broader discontent among young Indians regarding employment opportunities and educational issues.
summary.zh: 印度一场针对考试泄题的讽刺性抗议活动，已演变为一场由青年主导的更广泛的运动。该运动表达了印度年轻人对就业和教育问题日益增长的不满。

body.en:
What started as a satirical protest against exam leaks in India has grown into a wider movement voicing young Indians' anger over jobs and education.

Riot police fired tear gas and used batons in New Delhi as tens of thousands of supporters of the satirical Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) marched towards India's Parliament on Monday (July 20).

Police in the Indian capital said 60 protesters and 118 police officers were injured in the clashes between demonstrators and security forces. Mobile internet was suspended in parts of the city, including around the Jantar Mantar protest site, during the violence.

Protesters are demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan. Earlier this year, authorities canceled the high-stakes NEET medical entrance exam over a leaked question paper , affecting millions of students and sparking outrage across India .

The CJP began as an online campaign in May and rapidly evolved into a Gen Z street movement , giving a voice to a generation frustrated by unemployment, shrinking opportunities and a failing education system.

The youth-led "Cockroach" party is now posing an unexpected challenge for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government , prompting a response that combines political outreach with police action.

Modi's rivals have also tried to step in and take advantage of the youth's frustrations.

"Is this how a government behaves? Using tear gas and baton charges against students? This is a worthless government," Renuka Chowdhury, an MP from India's opposition Congress party, told DW.

The CJP movement  gained fresh momentum over the weekend after veteran reform activist Sonam Wangchuk, whose three-week hunger strike has become a symbol of the protests, was forcibly taken to a hospital by police . 

It is not the first time India has experienced major protest movements. Hunger strikes, famously used by Mahatma Gandhi, remain a common and peaceful form of protest in India.

India Against Corruption (IAC) led by veteran activist Anna Hazare, managed to mobilize millions in 2011 and reshape the country's political landscape. A decade later, yearlong farmers' protests forced Modi to repeal controversial farm laws. However, a 2023 Olympic wrestlers' protest over allegations of sexual harassment achieved few of their goals, despite widespread sympathy.

Analysts say the CJP lacks a nationwide organizational network, which the farmers had at their disposal. Yet like the IAC movement, it has tapped into a broader public mood.

"This protest is different because it reflects a much broader cross-section of Indian society," said Yamini Aiyar, an analyst and senior visiting fellow at Brown University. "They are expressing their frustration with a country whose long-atrophied education...
body.zh: 最初是针对印度考试泄密的讽刺抗议，现已发展成为一场更广泛的运动，表达印度年轻人对就业和教育的愤怒。 周一（7 月 20 日），讽刺性的蟑螂简塔党 (CJP) 的数万名支持者向印度议会游行，防暴警察发射催泪瓦斯并使用警棍。 印度首都警方表示，示威者与安全部队发生冲突，造成 60 名抗议者和 118 名警察受伤。暴力事件期间，该市部分地区的移动互联网被暂停，包括简塔·曼塔天文台抗议地点周围。 抗议者要求教育部长达门德拉·普拉丹(Dharmendra Pradhan)辞职。今年早些时候，当局因试卷泄露而取消了高风险的尼特族医学入学考试，影响了数百万学生，并引发了印度各地的愤怒。 CJP 于 5 月开始是一场在线运动，并迅速演变为 Z 世代街头运动，为因失业、机会减少和教育体系失败而沮丧的一代人发出声音。 由青年领导的“蟑螂”政党现在对纳伦德拉·莫迪总理的政府构成了意想不到的挑战，促使政府采取政治外展与警方行动相结合的应对措施。 莫迪的竞争对手也试图介入并利用年轻人的挫败感。 印度反对党国大党议员雷努卡·乔杜里 (Renuka Chowdhury) 向德国之声表示：“这就是政府的行为方式吗？对学生使用催泪瓦斯和警棍？这是一个毫无价值的政府。” 周末，资深改革活动家索南·旺楚克 (Sonam Wangchuk) 被警察强行送往医院，他的三周绝食已成为抗议活动的象征，CJP 运动获得了新的动力。 这并不是印度第一次经历大规模抗议活动。圣雄甘地著名的绝食抗议仍然是印度常见的和平抗议形式。 由资深活动人士安娜·哈扎尔 (Anna Hazare) 领导的印度反腐败组织 (IAC) 在 2011 年成功动员了数百万人，重塑了该国的政治版图。十年后，长达一年的农民抗议迫使莫迪废除有争议的农业法。然而，2023 年奥运会摔跤手针对性骚扰指控的抗议尽管得到了广泛的同情，但几乎没有实现他们的目标。 分析人士称，CJP 缺乏可供农民使用的全国性组织网络。 然而，就像 IAC 运动一样，它利用了更广泛的公众情绪。 布朗大学分析师兼高级访问学者亚米尼·艾亚尔 (Yamini Aiyar) 表示：“这次抗议活动与众不同，因为它反映了印度社会更广泛的层面。” “他们表达了对这个教育长期萎缩的国家的失望......

reflection.en: When young people feel their future is at stake due to systemic issues, their collective voice can rise as a powerful call for change. Yahweh's word reminds us that true justice should flow consistently and powerfully, addressing the deep-seated concerns of a society.
reflection.zh: 当年轻人因系统性问题感到未来受到威胁时，他们的集体声音会成为一股强大的变革呼吁。雅伟的话语提醒我们，真正的公义应如江河般持续而有力地流淌，回应社会深层关切。

verse.textEn: Let justice roll on like a river, righteousness like a never-failing stream!
verse.textZh: 惟愿公平如大水滚滚，使公义如江河滔滔。

title.en: 'Strong concerns': Australia meets with China following ballistic missile test
title.zh: “强烈关切”：澳大利亚在中国弹道导弹试验后与中方会晤

summary.en: Australia's Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart, expressing "strong concerns" and reiterating the importance of transparency following a recent ballistic missile test.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚外交部长黄英贤与中国外长举行会晤，对近期弹道导弹试验表达了“强烈关切”，并重申了透明度的重要性。

body.en:
Australia has raised its concerns with China over its nuclear-capable missile test in the South Pacific, noting many of the region's nations also shared the same view.

Foreign Minister Penny Wong met with her Chinese counterpart, Wang Yi, on the sidelines of ASEAN talks in the Philippines capital, Manila, on Tuesday evening.

"You speak about the importance of mutual understanding. I agree, and I expect we will discuss our concerns ... including around peace and stability in our region, safe and professional military conduct, and the importance of transparency and reassurance of intent," Wong said in opening remarks.

Wong noted the "strong concerns" expressed by many Pacific Island countries about the submarine-launched missile earlier in July.

The two foreign ministers also discussed the importance of peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

"You've often heard me say that we will cooperate where we can and disagree where we must, and we want to continue to engage because we believe that is in our national interest," Wong said.

Australia was only given a few hours' notice by China of the test, which was launched within hours of Prime Minister Anthony Albanese signing a new defence alliance with Fiji.

Albanese slammed the launch as a "provocative act" while other Pacific nations including New Zealand, Tuvalu and Fiji condemned the incident.

Solomon Islands Prime Minister Matthew Wale was standing beside his Australian counterpart in his country's capital Honiara in early July when he said the test was "not the act of a friend".

Albanese has previously flagged a strong statement would be issued by the Pacific Islands Forum, but the group's disagreement on the wording of the text has resulted in a delay.

A foreign ministers' meeting of the forum will be held in August, where the issue is likely to be discussed.

body.zh: 澳大利亚就中国在南太平洋进行的核导弹试验向中国表达了担忧，并指出该地区许多国家也持有同样的观点。 周二晚上，外交部长黄英贤在菲律宾首都马尼拉举行的东盟会谈期间会见了中国外交部长王毅。 黄在开场白中表示：“你谈到了相互理解的重要性。我同意，并且我希望我们能够讨论我们所关心的问题……包括我们地区的和平与稳定、安全和专业的军事行为，以及透明度和保证意图的重要性。” 黄指出，许多太平洋岛国7月初对潜射导弹表达了“强烈担忧”。 两国外长还讨论了印太地区和平与稳定的重要性。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 黄说：“你们经常听我说，我们将在能够合作的地方合作，在必须反对的地方反对，我们希望继续参与，因为我们相信这符合我们的国家利益。” 中国仅在几个小时内向澳大利亚发出了此次试验的通知，此次试验是在澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴内塞与斐济签署新的防务联盟后数小时内启动的。 阿尔巴内斯抨击这次发射是“挑衅行为”，而新西兰、图瓦卢和斐济等其他太平洋国家则谴责这一事件。 7月初，所罗门群岛总理马修·威尔在首都霍尼亚拉站在澳大利亚总理旁边，他表示这次测试“不是朋友的行为”。 阿尔巴内塞此前曾表示太平洋岛屿论坛将发表一份强硬声明，但该组织对文本措辞的分歧导致了这一声明的推迟。 论坛外长会议将于8月举行，届时可能会讨论这一问题。 如需了解 SBS 新闻的最新动态，请下载我们的应用程序并订阅我们的时事通讯。

reflection.en: In the wake of a ballistic missile test, diplomatic efforts to ensure transparency reflect a commitment to de-escalation and peaceful coexistence. Yahweh's word encourages us to pursue peace with all, as far as it depends on us, even amidst challenging international relations. Such dialogue, though difficult, is vital for fostering stability and...
reflection.zh: 在弹道导弹试验之后，旨在确保透明度的外交努力体现了对缓和局势与和平共处的承诺。雅伟的话语鼓励我们，只要力所能及，就要与所有人和平相处，即使在充满挑战的国际关系中也是如此。这种对话，尽管艰难，但对于促进国家间的稳定和理解至关重要。

verse.textEn: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
verse.textZh: 若是能行，总要尽力与众人和睦。

title.en: China narrows AI gap, challenges US influence
title.zh: 中国缩小人工智能差距，挑战美国影响力

summary.en: At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, China showcased its advancements in AI technology and promoted its vision for open-source development and global governance in the field, signaling a challenge to existing international influence.
summary.zh: 在上海举行的世界人工智能大会上，中国展示了其在人工智能技术方面的进展，并推广了其在开源开发和全球治理方面的愿景，这预示着对现有国际影响力的挑战。

body.en:
At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, Beijing showcased advances in AI while promoting its vision of open-source development and global governance.

As China narrows the artificial intelligence (AI) gap with the United States,  Beijing is promoting a narrative centered on "open source" and "inclusive AI" as an argument for its vision of global governance.

During his keynote speech at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai on Friday, Chinese President Xi Jinping expressed China's ambition to take a leading role in setting global standards in AI . He criticized what he described as the "overextension of the concept of national security."

Xi did not openly reference the United States. However, Beijing's effort to position itself as an advocate of a new AI order and challenge US dominance was unmistakable.

This year's Shanghai summit sent several important signals, says Rogier Creemers, assistant professor at Leiden University in the Netherlands specializing in China's digital technology policy. The WAIC indicates that artificial intelligence is now one of Beijing's political priorities, and that China intends to compete with the United States by supporting open-source AI models and promoting AI-driven industrialization, Creemers told DW. He also noted China hopes to win support from countries in the Global South for this effort.

China is steadily narrowing the gap with the United States in AI model development, and its efforts at AI application in industrial processes are slowly maturing. 

Chinese AI model developers have continued to keep pace on the global stage, largely by training open-weight models on limited but advanced computer hardware, Paul Triolo, senior vice president for China and tech policy lead at DGA-Albright Stonebridge Group, told DW.

Triolo believes deployment of AI across Chinese enterprises may be progressing faster than in the United States.

In addition, there is less fear of AI among the Chinese population than there is in the US, facilitating more rapid uptake of AI applications at the consumer level.

Earlier this year, Chinese state media claimed that the performance gap between Chinese and US AI models had "largely disappeared."

Several experts broadly agreed with this assessment, saying that certain benchmark tests of China's  large language models (LLMs) such as GLM-5.2 and Kimi K3 showed the gap narrowing or even fully closing.

For most applications, Triolo noted, China's leading open-weight AI models are cheaper to run and more than capable of handling most tasks.

At the same time, advanced proprietary models from leading US companies such as Anthropic, OpenAI  and Google still retain advantages in areas such as...
body.zh: 在上海举行的世界人工智能大会上，北京展示了人工智能的进步，同时宣传其开源发展和全球治理的愿景。 随着中国缩小与美国的人工智能 (AI) 差距，北京正在推动以“开源”和“包容性人工智能”为中心的叙事，作为其全球治理愿景的论据。 中国国家主席习近平周五在上海举行的世界人工智能大会（WAIC）上发表主旨演讲时表达了中国在制定人工智能全球标准方面发挥主导作用的雄心。他批评他所说的“国家安全概念的过度延伸”。 习近平没有公开提及美国。 然而，北京将自己定位为人工智能新秩序倡导者并挑战美国主导地位的努力是明确无误的。 荷兰莱顿大学专门研究中国数字技术政策的助理教授罗吉尔·克里默斯表示，今年的上海峰会发出了几个重要信号。 Creemers 告诉德国之声，WAIC 表明人工智能现在是北京的政治优先事项之一，中国打算通过支持开源人工智能模型和促进人工智能驱动的工业化来与美国竞争。他还指出，中国希望为此赢得南方国家的支持。 中国在人工智能模型开发方面与美国的差距正在稳步缩小，人工智能在工业流程中的应用也正在慢慢成熟。 DGA-Albright Stonebridge Group 中国区高级副总裁兼技术政策负责人 Paul Triolo 告诉德国之声，中国人工智能模型开发人员继续在全球舞台上保持同步，主要是在有限但先进的计算机硬件上训练开放权重模型。 Triolo 认为，中国企业的人工智能部署进展可能比美国更快。 此外，中国民众对人工智能的恐惧程度低于美国民众，这有助于消费者更快速地接受人工智能应用。 今年早些时候，中国官方媒体声称中国和美国人工智能模型之间的性能差距已经“基本消失”。 多位专家普遍同意这一评估，并表示，GLM-5.2和Kimi K3等中国大型语言模型（LLM）的某些基准测试表明，差距正在缩小甚至完全缩小。 Triolo 指出，对于大多数应用程序来说，中国领先的开放式人工智能模型的运行成本更低，并且能够处理大多数任务。 与此同时，Anthropic、OpenAI 和 Google 等美国领先公司的先进专有模型仍然在以下领域保持优势……

reflection.en: The rapid advancements in AI and visions for global technological governance highlight humanity's remarkable ingenuity and ambition. Yet, Yahweh's ancient warning from Genesis 11:6 reminds us to consider the spirit behind such endeavors, lest our pursuit of limitless capability overshadow the wisdom of humility and collaboration. True progress is found not...
reflection.zh: 人工智能的快速发展和全球技术治理的愿景，彰显了人类非凡的创造力和雄心。然而，雅伟在创世记11:6中的古老警示提醒我们，要审视这些努力背后的精神，以免我们对无限能力的追求，掩盖了谦逊和协作的智慧。真正的进步不仅在于我们能取得什么成就，更在于我们如何带着对终极依赖的认知来管理这些力量。

verse.textEn: Yahweh said, 'If as one people speaking the same language they have begun to do this, then nothing they plan to do will be impossible for them.'
verse.textZh: 雅伟说：「看哪，他们成为一样的人民，都是一样的言语，如今既做起这事来，以后他们所要做的事就没有不成就的了。」

title.en: Headaches for Silicon Valley as China chips away at the US’s lead in the AI race
title.zh: 硅谷面临挑战，中国在人工智能竞赛中削弱美国领先地位

summary.en: Silicon Valley companies, particularly Google, are reportedly facing challenges as Chinese AI models rapidly advance, raising questions about the US's long-standing dominance in technology.
summary.zh: 据报道，随着中国人工智能模型的迅速发展，硅谷公司，特别是谷歌，正面临挑战，这引发了对美国长期技术主导地位的质疑。
