body.zh: 随着新的中国模式（再次）对美国科技主导地位提出质疑，谷歌的人工智能陷入困境。你好，我是布莱克·蒙哥马利，在看完克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》和世界杯决赛的双头特写后给你写信。多么美好的周日啊。今天在科技领域，我们正在讨论中国如何削弱美国在人工智能竞赛中的领先地位，以及硅谷的工人如何采取行动保护他们的工作免受人工智能的影响。纽约成为第一个对新人工智能数据中心实施一年暂停的州 特朗普反对纽约州范围内的数据中心暂停 Albanese 的人工智能蓝图引发了人们呼吁在新法规出台之前暂停数据中心 “对抗性服装”：旨在迷惑面部识别系统的服装是否即将成为主流？随着科技巨头股价暴跌和利润下滑，IBM 损失了四分之一的价值“这有什么意义？”青少年对英国社交媒体宵禁做出了裁决，在全球故障特朗普一年内从加密货币中赚了 14 亿美元后，亚马逊网络服务客户收到高达 1.5 万亿美元的账单。孙宇晨是帮助他做到这一点的人吗？继续阅读...

reflection.en: The story highlights the rapid acceleration of artificial intelligence, as nations compete for technological leadership. Daniel 12:4 speaks of a time when "knowledge will increase," a prophetic observation that resonates with our era of unprecedented innovation. This reminds us that while human ingenuity drives progress, true wisdom lies in understanding...
reflection.zh: 这则新闻揭示了人工智能的迅速发展，各国竞相争夺技术领先地位。但以理书12:4预言“知识必增长”，这与我们这个前所未有的创新时代产生了共鸣。这提醒我们，虽然人类的聪明才智推动着进步，但真正的智慧在于理解其影响，并在其发展中寻求雅伟的指引。

verse.textEn: But you, Daniel, roll up and seal the words of the scroll until the time of the end. Many will go here and there to increase knowledge.
verse.textZh: 但以理啊，你要隐藏这话，封闭这书，直到末时。必有多人来往奔跑，知识就必增长。

title.en: China, Philippines clash in South China Sea ahead of ASEAN meeting
title.zh: 东盟会议前夕，中国与菲律宾在南海发生冲突

summary.en: China and the Philippines traded accusations after a violent altercation between navy personnel in the disputed South China Sea. The incident heightened tensions ahead of a major diplomatic summit in Manila.
summary.zh: 在南海争议水域，中国和菲律宾海军人员发生暴力冲突后，两国相互指责。这一事件在马尼拉举行的一次重要外交峰会前夕加剧了紧张局势。

body.en:
China and the Philippines traded accusations after a violent altercation between navy personnel in the disputed South China Sea. The incident heightened tensions ahead of a major diplomatic summit in Manila.

Sailors from the Chinese and Philippine navies faced off with oars and batons in the disputed South China Sea , with Philippine officials saying that one of its sailors suffered a head injury as a result of the altercation.

The latest confrontation took place on Monday near the Second Thomas Shoal, a contested area where the two countries have  repeatedly clashed before . The  Philippines keeps a military presence in the area aboard the grounded warship BRP Sierra Madre.

Manila said that Chinese Coast Guard personnel had assaulted Filipino sailors as they approached the outpost. 

China quickly rejected this narrative. Beijing's Foreign Ministry said in a statement that the "Philippine side provoked the incident first," by approaching the Chinese vessel in small rubber boats, but then "turned around ​and made counter-accusations, distorted the facts and engaged in malicious ​hype."

On Tuesday, China summoned the Philippine ambassador in Beijing to lodge its complaints, with the Philippines quickly following suit with the Chinese counterpart in Manila.

The Second Thomas Shoal is part of the Spratly islands, a disputed archipelago in the South China Sea.

The Spratlys are key to Beijing's claim of the entire South China Sea, a key global trade route. Beijing maintains its claim to the waterway despite a 2016 ruling by the Permanent Court of Arbitration in The Hague that there is no legal basis to its argument.

China has repeatedly demanded the removal of the outpost on the BRP Sierra Madre, and surrounded the atoll with its ships in a tense territorial standoff that has dragged on for years.

The incident came just ahead of a meeting of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) which was set to begin on Tuesday with foreign ministers of the eleven member states and external partners.

Australia's Foreign Minister Penny Wong, who was in Manila for the summit, denounced Beijing on Tuesday for what she called "destabilizing and dangerous conduct" during the standoff.

Wong, during a visit to the headquarters of the Philippine Coast Guard, also announced a support package for the agency totaling 10 million Australian dollars ($6.7 million) for drone technology.

The US State Department also issued a statement criticizing China's actions, saying its "troubling pattern of provocations against the Philippines' legitimate maritime operations undermines regional peace and stability."

"We stand with our Ally, the Philippines, and commend...
body.zh: 中国和菲律宾海军人员在有争议的南海发生暴力冲突后相互指责。这一事件加剧了马尼拉重大外交峰会前的紧张局势。 中国和菲律宾海军的水手在有争议的南海发生了桨和警棍对峙，菲律宾官员称，一名水手在争执中头部受伤。 最近的一次对抗发生在周一仁爱礁附近，这是两国此前曾多次发生冲突的争议地区。 菲律宾通过搁浅的 BRP Sierra Madre 军舰在该地区保持军事存在。 马尼拉表示，当菲律宾水手接近前哨基地时，中国海岸警卫队人员袭击了他们。 中国很快否认了这种说法。北京外交部在一份声明中表示，“菲律宾方面首先挑起事件”，乘坐小橡皮艇接近中国船只，但随后又“转而反指责，歪曲事实，恶意炒作”。 周二，中国召见菲律宾驻北京大使提出申诉，菲律宾也迅速与中国驻马尼拉大使进行跟进。 仁爱礁是南海有争议群岛南沙群岛的一部分。 南沙群岛是北京宣称对整个南海拥有主权的关键，南海是一条重要的全球贸易路线。 尽管海牙常设仲裁法院 2016 年裁定北京的主张没有法律依据，但北京仍然坚持对这条水道的主权主张。 中国一再要求拆除BRP马德雷山脉上的前哨基地，并用其船只包围了该环礁，造成了持续多年的紧张领土对峙。 这起事件发生在东南亚国家联盟 (ASEAN) 会议召开之前，该会议定于周二开始，十一个成员国和外部伙伴的外交部长参加了该会议。 正在马尼拉参加峰会的澳大利亚外交部长黄英贤周二谴责北京在对峙期间的“破坏稳定和危险的行为”。 黄在访问菲律宾海岸警卫队总部期间还宣布了为该机构提供总计 1000 万澳元（670 万美元）的无人机技术支持计划。 美国国务院也发表声明批评中国的行为，称其“对菲律宾合法海上行动的令人不安的挑衅模式破坏了地区和平与稳定”。 “我们与我们的盟友菲律宾站在一起，并赞扬......

reflection.en: Amidst rising tensions and accusations between nations, the call to pursue peace remains vital. Yahweh's word encourages us to live peaceably with all, as far as it depends on us, even when disagreements are sharp. This requires intentional effort and a commitment to de-escalation, especially when diplomatic solutions are sought.
reflection.zh: 在国家之间紧张局势加剧、相互指责之际，追求和平的呼召至关重要。雅伟的话语鼓励我们，只要我们能做到，就尽力与所有人和平相处，即使分歧尖锐。这需要有意的努力和致力于缓和局势，尤其是在寻求外交解决方案时。

verse.textEn: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
verse.textZh: 若是能行，总要尽力与众人和睦。

title.en: Chinese, Philippine personnel clash in the South China Sea
title.zh: 中菲人员在南海发生冲突

summary.en: Chinese Coast Guard and Philippine Navy personnel clashed in the South China Sea, resulting in a Philippine sailor sustaining a serious head injury. The incident involved the use of wooden batons during a confrontation between their boats.
summary.zh: 中国海警人员与菲律宾海军人员在南海发生冲突，双方船只上的队员使用木棍对峙，导致一名菲律宾水兵头部受重伤。

body.en: China Coast Guard personnel on a rigid hull inflatable boat clashed with Philippine Navy personnel aboard a rubber boat using wooden batons in the South China Sea on 20 July. According to Philippine authorities, one of their sailors suffered a serious head injury when a Chinese crew member allegedly struck him with a wooden baton.
body.zh: 7月20日，中国海警人员乘坐刚性充气艇与菲律宾海军人员乘坐橡皮艇在南海使用木棍发生冲突。据菲律宾当局称，一名中国船员据称用木棍殴打一名水手，导致其头部严重受伤。

reflection.en: The physical clash between personnel in the South China Sea highlights the fragility of peace in contested regions. Yahweh's word calls us to pursue peace actively, as far as it depends on us, even amidst disagreements. This incident reminds us of the constant need for restraint and diplomatic efforts to prevent escalation and injury.
reflection.zh: 南海人员之间的肢体冲突凸显了争议地区和平的脆弱性。雅伟的话语呼吁我们，只要力所能及，就要积极追求和平，即使在分歧之中也是如此。这一事件提醒我们，需要时刻保持克制并进行外交努力，以防止冲突升级和人员受伤。

verse.textEn: If it is possible, as far as it depends on you, live at peace with everyone.
verse.textZh: 若是能行，总要尽力与众人和睦。

title.en: Chinese warship holds live-fire drills inside Japan’s economic waters for first time
title.zh: 中国军舰首次在日本专属经济区内举行实弹演习

summary.en: A Chinese missile destroyer conducted live-fire drills for the first time within Japan's exclusive economic zone, approximately 180km from Okinotori, Japan's southernmost island. This incident follows recent clashes between Chinese and Philippine sailors in the South China Sea, marking a significant escalation of...
summary.zh: 一艘中国导弹驱逐舰首次在日本专属经济区内举行实弹演习，地点距离日本最南端的冲之鸟岛约180公里。此次事件发生在中国和菲律宾水兵在南海发生冲突之后，标志着该地区军事活动的显著升级。

body.en: Exercise took place about 180km from Okinotori, Japan’s southernmost island, and comes as Chinese and Philippine sailors clashed in the South China Sea A Chinese missile destroyer fired live rounds for the first time inside Japan’s exclusive economic zone (EEZ) during a drill on Sunday, a day before Chinese and Philippine sailors clashed in the South China Sea. Three Chinese warships and a Russian frigate were spotted sailing between Okinawa’s main island and Miyako island into the Pacific on Thursday, before being picked up again around 330km south-west of Okinotori in the early hours of Sunday morning. Continue reading...
body.zh: 演习在距日本最南端岛屿冲之鸟岛约 180 公里处举行，正值中国和菲律宾船员在南海发生冲突。周日的演习中，一艘中国导弹驱逐舰首次在日本专属经济区 (EEZ) 内发射实弹，而前一天，中国和菲律宾船员在南海发生冲突。周四，三艘中国军舰和一艘俄罗斯护卫舰被发现在冲绳本岛和宫古岛之间驶入太平洋，周日凌晨在冲绳县西南约 330 公里处再次被发现。继续阅读...

reflection.en: The news of live-fire drills in contested waters can stir apprehension and fear about regional stability. In moments of geopolitical tension, Yahweh reminds us not to fear, for He is with us, strengthening and upholding us. His presence offers a steadfast anchor when nations assert power and threats loom.
reflection.zh: 在争议水域进行实弹演习的消息，可能引发人们对地区稳定的担忧和恐惧。在地缘政治紧张的时刻，雅伟提醒我们不要惧怕，因为他与我们同在，加固并扶持我们。当国家展示武力、威胁迫近时，他的同在提供了一个坚定的锚。

verse.textEn: So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
verse.textZh: 你不要害怕，因为我与你同在；不要惊惶，因为我是你的神。

title.en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for failing to stop sale of illegal and fake goods
title.zh: 全球速卖通因未能阻止非法和假冒商品销售被欧盟罚款5.5亿欧元

summary.en: The Chinese online retail platform AliExpress has been fined €550 million by the EU for failing to prevent the sale of illegal and counterfeit products, including unsafe toys, on its platform.
summary.zh: 中国在线零售平台全球速卖通（AliExpress）因未能阻止其平台上销售非法和假冒产品（包括不安全玩具）而被欧盟处以5.5亿欧元的罚款。

body.en: Chinese retail platform handed penalty over listings for items such as counterfeit products and unsafe toys Business live – latest updates The Chinese online retail platform AliExpress has been fined a record €550m (£470m) by the EU over its failure to stop illegal goods including harmful clothing, cosmetics and kitchen gadgets being sold through its site. The European Commission fine is the biggest imposed by the bloc under Digital Services Act (DSA) legislation to protect consumers from illegal goods and deceptive or addictive marketing techniques. Continue reading...
body.zh: 中国零售平台对假冒产品和不安全玩具等商品进行处罚 Business live – 最新更新 中国在线零售平台速卖通因未能阻止通过其网站销售有害服装、化妆品和厨房用具等非法商品而被欧盟处以创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元（4.7 亿英镑）罚款。欧盟委员会的罚款是欧盟根据数字服务法 (DSA) 立法征收的最大一笔罚款，旨在保护消费者免受非法商品和欺骗性或成瘾性营销技术的侵害。继续阅读...

reflection.en: This significant fine highlights the critical importance of integrity in commerce and the responsibility of platforms to ensure fair and honest trade. Yahweh's word reminds us that dishonest practices, like false balances, are an abomination, while just weights bring delight. Upholding ethical standards protects consumers and builds trust in the marketplace.
reflection.zh: 这笔巨额罚款凸显了商业诚信的关键重要性，以及平台确保公平诚实贸易的责任。雅伟的话语提醒我们，不诚实的做法，如假秤，是祂所憎恶的，而公道的砝码则令祂喜悦。坚持道德标准能保护消费者，并在市场中建立信任。

verse.textEn: Yahweh detests dishonest scales, but accurate weights find favor with him.
verse.textZh: 诡诈的天平为雅伟所憎恶；公平的法码为他所喜悦。

title.en: The Guardian view on perceptions of superpowers: the world isn’t Chinamaxxing, it’s America-avoidant | Editorial
title.zh: 《卫报》观点：对超级大国的看法——世界并非在“中国化”，而是在“避开美国” | 社论

summary.en: Startling new research shows that in many countries – including old US allies – the public prefers Beijing to Washington. Earlier this year, a spate of Western TikTok and Instagram creators announced that they were at “a very Chinese time in my life” – drinking hot water and...
summary.zh: 一项令人震惊的新研究显示，在许多国家——包括美国的传统盟友——公众更倾向于北京而非华盛顿。今年早些时候，一些西方TikTok和Instagram创作者宣布他们正处于“我生命中非常中国化的时期”——喝热水并...

body.en: Startling new research shows that in many countries – including old US allies – the public prefers Beijing to Washington Earlier this year, a spate of western TikTok and Instagram creators announced that they were at “a very Chinese time in my life” – drinking hot water and wearing slippers around their homes. The Chinamaxxing phenomenon primarily reflected the constant need of influencers for novel content. But social media trends also reflect a growing fascination with China, as the economic historian Adam Tooze has noted . While it broods over China’s economic, military and technical advance, the Trump administration is accelerating Beijing’s diplomatic progress, as striking new polling by the Pew Research Center shows. For the first time, China and Xi Jinping are seen more favourably than the US and its president in most of the 36 major countries surveyed – including Canada, Mexico and Australia. Only in six countries did people rate the US more highly. While Beijing has seen significant improvements in some places, the slump in Washington’s standing is more dramatic. Across 20 countries, the median percentage with a favourable view of China rose from 32% to 46% between 2023 and this year; for the US, it fell from 58% to 36%. Views of China were much more positive in Latin America, Africa and parts of south and south-east Asia than in wealthier European and east Asian countries. Continue reading...
body.zh: 令人震惊的新研究表明，在许多国家 — — 包括美国的老盟友 — — 公众更喜欢北京而不是华盛顿。 今年早些时候，一大批西方 TikTok 和 Instagram 创作者宣布，他们正处于“我一生中非常中国化的时期”——喝着热水，在家中穿着拖鞋。 Chinamaxshing现象主要反映了网红对新颖内容的持续需求。但正如经济历史学家亚当·图兹（Adam Tooze）指出的那样，社交媒体趋势也反映出人们对中国日益增长的迷恋。皮尤研究中心令人震惊的最新民意调查显示，在关注中国经济、军事和技术进步的同时，特朗普政府正在加速北京的外交进展。在接受调查的 36 个主要国家（包括加拿大、墨西哥和澳大利亚）中，大多数国家对中国和习近平的好感度首次高于美国及其总统。只有六个国家的人们对美国的评价更高。尽管北京在某些方面取得了显着进步，但华盛顿的地位下滑更为严重。 2023 年至今，20 个国家对中国持好感的中位数百分比从 32% 上升至 46%；美国则从 58% 下降至 36%。拉丁美洲、非洲以及南亚和东南亚部分地区对中国的看法比富裕的欧洲和东亚国家要积极得多。继续阅读...

reflection.en: The shifting global perceptions of superpowers, as highlighted in the news, remind us that a nation's true standing is often tied to its character and actions. Proverbs 14:34 suggests that righteousness elevates a people, while moral failings can bring disgrace. This perspective encourages us to consider how nations, like individuals, are ultimately judged...
reflection.zh: 新闻中强调的全球对超级大国看法的转变，提醒我们一个国家真正的地位往往与其品格和行为息息相关。箴言14:34指出，公义使邦国高举，罪恶是人民的羞辱。这一视角鼓励我们思考，国家如同个人，最终会因其正直和所体现的价值观而受到评判。

verse.textEn: Righteousness exalts a nation, but sin condemns any people.
verse.textZh: 公义使邦国高举；罪恶是人民的羞辱。

title.en: 'Shocking vulnerabilities': Trump makes sweeping claims China meddled in US elections
title.zh: “令人震惊的漏洞”：特朗普就中国干预美国大选发表全面声明

summary.en: The US president made broad election security claims, laying groundwork for the federal government to take action.
summary.zh: 美国总统就选举安全问题发表了广泛声明，为联邦政府采取行动奠定了基础。

body.en:
In a speech attacking US election integrity on Friday, US President Donald Trump released intelligence that he said showed major Chinese interference in US elections, reviving his false claims he won the 2020 election.

Trump's allegations about the "shocking vulnerabilities" in the American electoral system appeared to lay the groundwork for the Republican to dispute the results of November's crucial US midterm elections .

It underscored Trump's effort to make election security a central political issue ahead of November's midterm vote, when Republicans in Congress will face the prospect of losing control of both the House of Representatives and Senate — an outcome that would carry significant political consequences for Trump.

"We can never watch a stolen election again," Trump said in the primetime address, referencing his 2020 presidential election defeat by Democrat Joe Biden.

Trump said he was declassifying huge amounts of intelligence data that showed, among other things, that superpower rival China had illicitly acquired 220 million US voter files.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

"Over a period of years, starting during the 2020 election cycle, the People's Republic of China carried out what is believed to be the largest compromise of election data in history," Trump said in the televised speech from the White House.

He asserted that members of the US intelligence community deliberately suppressed information about the extent of China's activities.

His allegations contradict an unclassified 2021 US intelligence community assessment that found no indications any foreign actor tried to alter or succeeded in altering "any technical aspect" of the 2020 presidential election vote.

The assessment was conducted under John Ratcliffe, then Trump's director of national intelligence and now his CIA director.

Trump also claimed there were more than 250,000 non-US citizens registered to vote in four states.

Trump has persistently claimed his 2020 election defeat was "rigged," although more than 60 lawsuits produced no ruling establishing fraud capable of changing the outcome, while recounts, audits and his own justice department found none.

After railing against election security in the 25-minute address, Trump pressed Republicans in Congress to pass his signature elections legislation, the SAVE America Act, which has been stalled for months.

It seeks to impose new voter identification and citizenship requirements, despite longstanding findings that voter fraud in US elections is rare.

Election security experts have said these measures would make it harder for millions of eligible voters to cast a ballot.

body.zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在周五发表的一场攻击美国选举公正性的演讲中，公布了他所说的显示中国对美国选举进行重大干预的情报，再次重申了他赢得 2020 年大选的虚假说法。 特朗普对美国选举制度“令人震惊的漏洞”的指控似乎为共和党对11月至关重要的美国中期选举结果提出异议奠定了基础。 这突显了特朗普在11月中期投票之前努力使选举安全成为一个核心政治问题，届时国会中的共和党人将面临失去众议院和参议院控制权的前景——这一结果将对特朗普带来重大政治后果。 特朗普在黄金时段讲话中表示，“我们再也不能看到一场被窃取的选举”，他指的是他在 2020 年总统选举中输给民主党人乔·拜登。 特朗普表示，他正在解密大量情报数据，这些数据显示超级大国竞争对手中国非法获取了 2.2 亿份美国选民档案。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 特朗普在白宫电视讲话中表示：“从 2020 年选举周期开始，多年来，中华人民共和国对选举数据进行了据信是历史上最大规模的妥协。” 他声称，美国情报界成员故意压制有关中国活动范围的信息。 他的指控与美国情报界 2021 年非机密评估相矛盾，该评估没有发现任何外国行为者试图改变或成功改变 2020 年总统选举投票的“任何技术方面”的迹象。 该评估是在时任特朗普国家情报总监、现任中央情报局局长约翰·拉特克利夫的领导下进行的。 特朗普还声称有超过25万名非美国公民在四个州登记投票。 特朗普一直声称他的 2020 年选举失败是“被操纵的”，尽管 60 多起诉讼没有产生任何裁决证明存在能够改变结果的欺诈行为，而重新计票、审计和他自己的司法部门也没有发现任何证据。 在 25 分钟的演讲中谴责选举安全后，特朗普向国会共和党人施压，要求通过他的标志性选举法案《拯救美国法案》，该法案已被搁置数月。 尽管长期以来的调查结果表明美国选举中的选民欺诈很少见，但它仍寻求实施新的选民身份和公民身份要求。 选举安全专家表示，这些措施将使数百万合格选民更难投票。 特朗普在讲话中还...

title.en: Minister says IS-linked doctor should 'rot in jail' after his discovery in Iraq
title.zh: 部长称与伊斯兰国有关的医生在伊拉克被发现后应该“在监狱里腐烂”

summary.en: It was assumed that pediatrician Tareq Kamleh had been killed in Syria in 2017.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自澳洲栏目的新闻，重点涉及领导、智慧与公共责任。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
The federal opposition is calling on the government to block the potential return of an Australian man who joined the so-called Islamic State militant group and was widely believed to have been killed in Syria, before being found in an Iraqi jail.

Pediatrician Tareq Kamleh, colloquially known as "Doctor Jihad" who went by the name "Abu Yusuf al-Australi", travelled to Syria in 2015 to join the terror organisation.

He was assumed to have been killed in 2017's final siege of Raqqa, the de facto capital of the self-proclaimed Islamic caliphate in Syria.

But it has since been revealed Kamleh is one-of-13 men linked to the terror group who are imprisoned in Iraq. The Australian newspaper reported on Wednesday he didn't die in the siege as his family believed.

He is believed to be among dozens of foreign fighters who were transferred from Syria to Iraq earlier this year.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

When prisoners were first tranferred from Syria to Iraq earlier this year, Baghdad appealed for nations to take back their citizens and asked for financial assistance to house them in the meantime.

SBS has been unable to independently verify whether the Australian prisoners are seeking to return home.

According to Iraq's Supreme Judicial Council, Kamleh told Iraqi authorities following his transfer that he did not directly participate in combat operations but worked within what was known as the "health department" of IS, utilising his medical qualifications and experience in healthcare. 

"He provided first aid and treatment to wounded ISIS members during terrorist operations and battles against security forces," the document, seen by SBS News, states.

"The accused's activities were not limited to providing medical services. He adopted the extremist group's propaganda, advocating for terrorist activity not to be confined to conflict zone."

Iraqi judge Ali Hussein Jafat, head of the National Center for International Judicial Cooperation, said that the investigation into Kamleh was ongoing.

Labor frontbencher Clare O'Neil said she didn't want Kamleh to ever return to Australia and he should "rot in jail".

"He's obviously made a decision to join a violent death cult, and he needs to be accountable for that," she said.

But fellow senior minister Murray Watt said the government faced constitutional limitations on preventing Kamleh, an Australian citizen, from returning.

"Anyone who returns to Australia who's been part of these sorts of organisations will face the full force of the law," Senator Watt told Nine's Today program.

"We won't be providing assistance, just as we haven't provided assistance to others to come back ."

reflection.en: This story draws attention to justice, dignity, and accountability. Micah 6:8 reminds us to meet sharp headlines with justice tempered by mercy, asking how faithful people can respond with wisdom instead of noise.
reflection.zh: 这则新闻让人想到公义、尊严与问责。Micah 6:8提醒我们，在快速变化的新闻里，仍要以带着怜悯的公义来回应，并学习用祷告与分辨代替情绪化判断。

verse.textEn: What does Yahweh require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
verse.textZh: 雅伟向你所要的是什么呢？只要你行公义，好怜悯，存谦卑的心，与你的神同行。

title.en: 'Truth-teller': Rebel Wilson victorious in defamation trial brought by The Deb co-star
title.zh: “真理讲述者”：瑞贝尔·威尔逊在《债务》联合主演提起的诽谤案中胜诉

summary.en: Actor Rebel Wilson won a defamation trial against her former co-star Charlotte MacInnes. MacInnes had accused Wilson of defaming her in social media posts that implied she was a liar and a sellout.
summary.zh: 演员瑞贝尔·威尔逊在一场诽谤诉讼中胜诉，该诉讼由她的前合作演员夏洛特·麦金尼斯提起。麦金尼斯曾指控威尔逊在社交媒体帖子中诽谤她，暗示她是个骗子和叛徒。

body.en:
After a blistering dispute that spanned continents and years, Hollywood A-lister Rebel Wilson has been found not to have defamed her co-star in a series of social media posts.

The Pitch Perfect star was sued by Australian actor Charlotte MacInnes, who played the lead role in Wilson's directorial debut film The Deb.

MacInnes claimed Wilson defamed her in a series of social media posts that implied she was a liar and a sellout who walked back a sexual harassment complaint to further her career.

The posts alleged the young actor confided in Wilson — and later recanted — that she felt uncomfortable when the film's co-producer Amanda Ghost asked to have a shower and a bath together.

MacInnes denied making or retracting a complaint, insisting she had not been uncomfortable when the pair shared a bath in their swimwear after Ghost suffered a medical episode in September 2023.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Two months after the conclusion of the hotly contested court fight in the Federal Court, Justice Elizabeth Raper found in favour of Wilson on Wednesday.

"MacInnes has failed to establish that the publications have caused or were likely to cause serious harm," she said.

MacInnes' barrister Sue Chrysanthou accused Wilson of a "complete revision of history" littered with dishonesty during her emphatic closing address in May.

"She is a fantastical liar who has made up terrible, terrible allegations about multiple people and her own witnesses have discredited her," she said.

But Wilson repeatedly denied accusations she fabricated the complaint or raised it for leverage during disputes with her co-producers over the film's budget and writing credit.

That was what she had been doing when she posted the stories to her 11 million followers, the Bridesmaids star said.

"I don't classify it as an attack, I classify it as telling the truth," she told the court.

Her barrister, Dauid Sibtain, said his client had "no motive to lie" about something that would endanger her film by driving a wedge between her lead actor and a producer.

Instead, he accused MacInnes of dishonestly withdrawing the complaint about Ghost to ensure her relationship with the producer continued to be fruitful.

MacInnes had received a lead role in a stage production and a six-figure record deal that were linked to Ms Ghost, he argued, and she wanted to ensure she continued to rise.

The young actor sought aggravated damages for the harm allegedly wrought by the posts, including anxiety and a period without work.

For the latest from SBS News, download our app and subscribe to our newsletter .
body.zh: 在一场跨越各大洲、历时数年的激烈纠纷之后，好莱坞一线明星瑞贝尔·威尔逊被发现没有在一系列社交媒体帖子中诽谤她的搭档。 这位《完美音调》的明星被澳大利亚演员夏洛特·麦金尼斯起诉，后者在威尔逊的导演处女作《黛布》中扮演主角。 麦金尼斯声称威尔逊在一系列社交媒体帖子中诽谤她，暗示她是一个骗子和出卖者，为了进一步发展自己的职业生涯，她对性骚扰投诉进行了反击。 这些帖子称，这位年轻演员向威尔逊吐露——后来又放弃了——当电影联合制片人阿曼达·幽灵要求一起洗澡时，她感到不舒服。 麦金尼斯否认提出或撤回投诉，坚称在 2023 年 9 月“幽灵”生病后，两人穿着泳衣共用浴缸时，她并没有感到不舒服。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 联邦法院这场激烈争议的法庭斗争结束两个月后，法官伊丽莎白·拉珀(Elizabeth Raper)于周三做出了对威尔逊有利的裁决。 “麦金尼斯未能证明这些出版物已经造成或可能造成严重伤害，”她说。 麦金尼斯的律师苏·克里桑托 (Sue Chrysanthou) 在五月的闭幕致辞中指责威尔逊“彻底修改历史”，充满了不诚实。 她说：“她是一个彻头彻尾的骗子，对多人做出了非常非常可怕的指控，而她自己的证人也让她名誉扫地。” 但威尔逊一再否认她捏造投诉的指控，或者在与联合制片人就电影预算和编剧功劳发生争执时提出投诉。 这位《伴娘》明星表示，当她向 1100 万粉丝发布这些故事时，她就是这么做的。 “我不把它归类为攻击，我把它归类为说实话，”她告诉法庭。 她的律师 Dauid Sibtain 表示，他的委托人“没有动机撒谎”，因为这会在她的主演和制片人之间挑拨离间，从而危及她的电影。 相反，他指责麦金尼斯不诚实地撤回了对《人鬼情未了》的投诉，以确保她与制片人的关系继续富有成效。 他认为，麦金尼斯在舞台制作中担任主角，并获得了与幽灵女士相关的六位数唱片合约，而她希望确保自己继续崛起。 这位年轻演员就据称这些帖子造成的伤害寻求加重赔偿，包括焦虑和一段时间没有工作。 如需了解 SBS 新闻的最新动态，请下载我们的应用程序并订阅我们的时事通讯。

reflection.en: This story reminds us that while falsehoods can spread rapidly, truth ultimately has enduring power. In a world often quick to judge based on fleeting social media posts, the legal process here affirmed the lasting nature of truth over temporary accusations. Yahweh's word assures us that truthful lips endure, even when challenged.
reflection.zh: 这个故事提醒我们，虽然谎言可能迅速传播，但真理最终拥有持久的力量。在一个常常根据短暂的社交媒体帖子迅速做出判断的世界里，这次法律程序肯定了真理相对于暂时指控的持久性。雅伟的话语向我们保证，诚实的嘴唇必存到永远，即使受到挑战。

verse.textEn: Truthful lips endure forever, but a lying tongue lasts only a moment.
verse.textZh: 口吐真言，永远坚立；舌说谎话，只存片时。

title.en: How long is too long to live with your parents? Australians reveal their answer
title.zh: 在家里住多久算太久？澳大利亚人揭示他们的答案

summary.en: A new survey in Australia indicates a perceived "right" age for young adults to move out of their family homes. However, the current economic climate, characterized by escalating rents and limited housing availability, presents significant challenges to achieving this independence.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚一项新调查显示，人们认为年轻人搬离父母家有一个“合适”的年龄。然而，当前租金飙升和住房空置率紧张的经济状况，使得实现这种独立面临巨大挑战。

body.en:
A new survey has revealed the age Australians think is "too old" to still be living at home — and the findings land as rents climb and rental vacancies stay tight. 

The survey, from financial comparison site Finder, asked 1,010 Australians to weigh in on how old was "too old" to be still living in the family home, with the average Australian saying 31-years-old was the cut-off date.

It found gen z and baby boomers held the harshest views, both agreeing that 30 was too old to still be living with family.

Millennials and gen x were slightly more forgiving, nominating 32 as the cut-off.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

But Finder's personal finance expert Sarah Megginson says those numbers don't reflect the financial reality many Australians are living through.

"We know renters are doing it tough — Finder's data shows 47 per cent of Aussie tenants struggled to pay their rent in June," Megginson told SBS News.

"In many suburbs, renters are spending half of their weekly income or more just on rent, and after other bills are paid there’s not much left over for groceries and simply living."

The accepted benchmark for rental stress is spending 30 per cent of income on rent — a threshold Megginson says many Australians would now consider "welcome relief" by comparison.

She says the housing crisis is pushing back the traditional markers of adulthood.

"The traditional milestones of adulthood are being pushed further back, with many people delaying moving out, buying a home and starting a family," she said.

It's not necessarily a new trend, either — though data does suggest it's accelerated in recent years.

A July report from research firm McCrindle found young Australians were living with their parents for longer. In 2006, 60 per cent of 19-year-olds lived at home — but by 2021, that figure climbed to 70 per cent.

Their analysis found that young Australians were being challenged with high levels of student debt and a competitive housing market — with some returning to the family nest after moving out to accelerate savings for a housing deposit.

Almost three in five Australians (57 per cent) said they're open to or would welcome living in a multi-generational home with their family — defined as three or more generations living under the same roof.

Twelve per cent currently live in a multi-generational home, McCrindle found, while 32 per cent have done so in the past — with those who speak a language other than English at home significantly more likely to live in this way.

The pressure to move out of home is playing out against a rental market that's becoming steadily less...
body.zh: 一项新的调查显示，澳大利亚人认为“太老”而不能继续住在家里的年龄——随着租金上涨和出租房空置率持续紧张，调查结果也随之而来。 这项来自财务比较网站 Finder 的调查要求 1,010 名澳大利亚人衡量多大年龄才算“太老”，不适合继续住在家里，澳大利亚人平均认为 31 岁是截止日期。 调查发现，Z 世代和婴儿潮一代持有最严厉的观点，他们都认为 30 岁已经太老了，不适合与家人住在一起。 千禧一代和 X 一代的态度稍微宽容一些，他们指定 32 岁为界限。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 但 Finder 的个人理财专家莎拉·梅金森 (Sarah Megginson) 表示，这些数字并不能反映许多澳大利亚人所经历的财务现实。 梅金森告诉 SBS 新闻：“我们知道租房者的处境很艰难——Finder 的数据显示 47% 的澳大利亚租户在 6 月份难以支付租金。” “在许多郊区，租房者每周收入的一半甚至更多都花在租金上，在支付其他账单后，剩下的钱就没有多少可以用来购买杂货和简单的生活了。” 公认的租金压力基准是将收入的 30% 用于租金——梅金森表示，相比之下，许多澳大利亚人现在会考虑“受欢迎的救济”。 她说，住房危机正在推迟传统的成年标志。 她说：“成年的传统里程碑被进一步推迟，许多人推迟了搬家、买房和组建家庭的时间。” 这也不一定是一种新趋势——尽管数据确实表明近年来这种趋势正在加速。 研究公司 McCrindle 7 月份的一份报告发现，年轻的澳大利亚人与父母住在一起的时间更长。 2006 年，60% 的 19 岁年轻人住在家里，但到 2021 年，这一数字攀升至 70%。 他们的分析发现，年轻的澳大利亚人面临着高额学生债务和竞争激烈的住房市场的挑战——一些人在搬出去加速储蓄住房押金后返回家庭。 近五分之三的澳大利亚人（57%）表示，他们愿意或欢迎与家人一起生活在多代人的住宅中——定义为三代或更多代人生活在同一屋檐下。 麦克林德尔发现，目前有 12% 的人住在多代同堂的房子里，而 32% 的人过去也曾这样做过——那些在家说英语以外语言的人更有可能以这种方式生活。 搬出家的压力正在对日益减少的租赁市场产生影响......

reflection.en: This survey highlights a tension between societal expectations for young adults and the economic realities of soaring rents. Proverbs 15:17 reminds us that the quality of relationships within a home, marked by love, is more valuable than material abundance or the lack thereof. In times when economic pressures keep families living together longer,...
reflection.zh: 这项调查揭示了社会对年轻人独立生活的期望与高昂租金的经济现实之间的张力。箴言15:17提醒我们，家中充满爱意的素菜，胜过充满仇恨的肥牛。在经济压力使家庭成员同住时间更长时，优先考虑彼此的爱意，能将这种必要性转化为祝福。

verse.textEn: Better a small serving of vegetables with love than a fattened calf with hatred.
verse.textZh: 吃素菜，彼此相爱，强如吃肥牛，彼此相恨。

title.en: 'Terrible advice': Advocates call out Hanson's domestic violence 'two-way street' comments
title.zh: “糟糕的建议”：倡导者批评汉森关于家庭暴力是“双向街”的言论

summary.en: Advocates and experts have criticized comments made by a public figure regarding domestic violence, stating that the remarks demonstrated ignorance of the realities faced by victims of family violence.
summary.zh: 倡导者和专家批评了一位公众人物关于家庭暴力的言论，指出这些言论显示出对家庭暴力受害者所面临现实的无知。

body.en:
Brittany Higgins and anti-violence campaigner Tarang Chawla are among those criticising Pauline Hanson's comments that domestic violence is a "two-way street", and that women experiencing it "shouldn't put up with it".

Speaking to Brisbane's 4BC radio on Wednesday, the One Nation leader said that while domestic violence was "wrong", she attributed the crisis to the "pressures of living".

"I'm not saying that it's just men; women can lose their cool as well. Society is under so much pressure than what it used to be," Hanson said.

"I've been through it myself in life, and I just feel that if you're not in a house where you feel safe ... If these women are getting abused by men out there, then don't put up with it."

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Chawla, a writer, lawyer and advocate, said Hanson's suggestion was "terrible advice".

Chawla's sister, Nikita Chawla, was stabbed to death by her husband, Parminder Singh, in 2015 . Singh was sentenced to 22 years in prison for her murder.

Responding to a social media post by Women's Agenda, Chawla wrote: "My sister Niki tried to do what Ms Hanson suggests. Terrible advice. He murdered her. It is not as simple as 'don't put up with it'.

The responsibility isn't on the victim. It's on the person who is abusive or violent. Overwhelmingly, that person is a man."

Higgins also took to social media to respond to the comments, calling Hanson's remarks "atrocious".

She accused Hanson of normalising "victim blaming rhetoric in relation to domestic violence when 38 Australian women have already been lost to femicide" this year. That figure is according to advocate Sherele Moody's Australian Femicide Watch project.

In the space of one week in July, two women and two girls were allegedly murdered in Australia in separate incidents.

Then, on Wednesday morning, a 16-year-old boy was charged with murdering his mother, and attempting to kill his 12-year-old sister in a home in Perth's south-east.

Nicole Yade, CEO of frontline service Women's and Girls' Emergency Centre, also expressed concern the comments ignored the realities for many victims of domestic and family violence.

"Saying 'just leave' ignores proven patterns of behaviour that keep many victim-survivors trapped in abusive relationships," Yade said in a statement.

"Following an abusive incident, displays of remorse, love bombing, gifts and promises to change often manipulate victims into believing the violence will never happen again. Too often, the cycle then repeats."

"It also ignores a simple reality: you cannot leave if there is nowhere safe to go."

Hanson's comments were prompted by fellow One Nation politician Barnaby Joyce's remarks on...
body.zh: 布列塔尼·希金斯 (Brittany Higgins) 和反暴力活动家塔朗·查瓦拉 (Tarang Chawla) 等人批评宝琳·汉森 (Pauline Hanson) 的言论，即家庭暴力是一条“双向路”，遭受家庭暴力的女性“不应该忍受”。 这位一国党领导人周三在布里斯班的 4BC 电台发表讲话时表示，虽然家庭暴力是“错误的”，但她将这场危机归因于“生活压力”。 “我并不是说只有男人才会这样；女人也会失去冷静。社会比以前承受着更大的压力，”汉森说。 “我自己在生活中也经历过这种情况，我只是觉得，如果你不在一个让你感到安全的房子里……如果这些女人在外面受到男人的虐待，那就不要忍受。” 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 作家、律师和倡导者查瓦拉表示，汉森的建议是“糟糕的建议”。 Chawla 的妹妹 Nikita Chawla 于 2015 年被丈夫 Parminder Singh 刺死。辛格因谋杀罪被判处22年监禁。 乔拉在回应《妇女议程》的社交媒体帖子时写道：“我的妹妹尼基试图按照汉森女士的建议去做。这是糟糕的建议。他谋杀了她。这并不像‘不要忍受’那么简单。” 责任不在受害人身上。这是针对施虐或施暴的人。压倒性地，那个人是个男人。” 希金斯也在社交媒体上回应了这些言论，称汉森的言论“残暴”。 她指责汉森将“与家庭暴力有关的受害者指责言论正常化，而今年已有 38 名澳大利亚妇女因杀害女性而丧生”。这个数字是根据倡导者 Sherele Moody 的澳大利亚杀戮女性观察项目得出的。 7 月的一周内，两名妇女和两名女孩据称在澳大利亚的不同事件中被谋杀。 然后，周三早上，一名 16 岁男孩被指控在珀斯东南部的一处家中谋杀了他的母亲，并试图杀死他 12 岁的妹妹。 一线服务妇女和女童紧急中心首席执行官妮可·亚德 (Nicole Yade) 也对这些言论忽视了许多家庭暴力受害者的现实表示担忧。 亚德在一份声明中说：“说‘离开吧’忽视了已证实的行为模式，这些模式使许多受害者幸存者陷入虐待关系。” “发生虐待事件后，表现出悔恨、爱情轰炸、礼物和改变的承诺往往会让受害者相信暴力永远不会再发生。这种循环往往会重复。” “它还忽略了一个简单的现实：如果无处可安全，你就无法离开。” 汉森的评论是由一国党政治家巴纳比乔伊斯的言论引发的……

reflection.en: When public discourse minimizes the suffering of domestic violence victims, it is vital for advocates to speak truth and defend the oppressed. Yahweh calls us to learn to do good, seek justice, and correct oppression, especially for those who are vulnerable. This reminds us of our responsibility to challenge harmful narratives and stand with those who are...
reflection.zh: 当公众言论轻视家庭暴力受害者的痛苦时，倡导者挺身而出，说出真相，捍卫受压迫者，至关重要。雅伟呼召我们学习行善，寻求公义，纠正欺压，特别是为那些脆弱的人。这提醒我们有责任挑战有害的叙事，并与那些正在遭受虐待的人站在一起。

verse.textEn: Learn to do right; seek justice. Defend the oppressed. Take up the cause of the fatherless; plead the case of the widow.
verse.textZh: 学习行善，寻求公平，解救受欺压的；给孤儿伸冤，为寡妇辨屈。

title.en: People with secret ‘safe phones’ advised to turn off devices during national test of AusAlert emergency warning
title.zh: 建议持有秘密“安全手机”的人在 AusAlert 紧急警报全国测试期间关闭设备

summary.en: Ten-second ‘siren’ to blare on most phones on Monday as part of national test despite reservations from some states Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast An unsilenceable siren will blare out of most...

title.en: Millions of Australian customer details potentially exposed after Origin Energy hacked
title.zh: Origin Energy 遭黑客攻击后，数百万澳大利亚客户详细信息可能遭到泄露

summary.en: The company said it was aware of an incident in which customer data may have been accessed by an unauthorised party.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自澳洲栏目的新闻，重点涉及管家责任、供应与公共福祉。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
Millions of Australians may have had data accessed by hackers after Origin Energy confirmed it is investigating a cybersecurity incident.

The energy giant is aware of an incident where unauthorised access to customer data may have been granted, it said in a statement to the ASX on Wednesday afternoon.

However, the company said it does not believe the data that was breached includes customer credit card or bank details.

"We understand an incident like this may raise concerns and acknowledge the impact of this uncertainty on Origin customers," it said.

"Our investigations into this incident are occurring as a matter of urgency, and Origin will provide further updates as appropriate."

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Earlier, The Australian newspaper reported it had received a sample of 50 customer records containing names, addresses, emails, dates of birth, phone numbers and bill history via a hacker.

Origin has 4.8 million customer accounts in Australia and provides electricity, natural gas, LPG, and internet services to residential and business customers.

The company says it has notified the Australian Federal Police, the Australian Cyber Security Centre and the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner about the incident.

For the latest from SBS News, download our app and subscribe to our newsletter .

title.en: The phone alert that could reveal a hidden lifeline
title.zh: 电话警报可能揭示隐藏的生命线

summary.en: Millions of phones will sound an emergency alert. For some, that noise could have consequences.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自澳洲栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
Share your feedback and help us improve this feature. Read more about how we use AI at SBS here.

On Monday 27 July, millions of mobile phones across Australia will simultaneously emit a loud emergency alert as authorities test the nation's new AusAlert system for the first time.

The nationwide test is designed to ensure Australians receive lifesaving warnings during emergencies such as natural disasters, public safety threats and biosecurity incidents.

But family and domestic violence advocates warn the mandatory alert could also create unintended safety risks for some victim–survivors.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Immigrant Women's Speak Out Association in western Sydney says its biggest concern is for women who depend on hidden emergency phones to seek help.

Its CEO, Maria Kissouri, says: "They need that phone in case of an emergency to be able to contact Triple Zero if they felt their life was threatened — that those women's safety might be compromised as an unintended consequence of the AusAlert system."

The organisation has supported migrant women experiencing domestic and family violence for more than 40 years.

A 2021 national study of migrant and refugee women conducted by Monash University's Migration and Inclusion Centre and the Harmony Alliance found one in three respondents had experienced family and domestic violence in the previous five years, rising to 40 per cent among temporary visa holders, who also reported much higher patterns of migration-related abuse and threats.

"What they experience after arriving in the country is abuse from their fiancé, their partner, or the person that they've just married," Kissouri tells SBS News.

As the nationwide test alert approaches, advocates are working to contact victim-survivors who may face risks from the alert — but say they cannot contact some people directly because doing so could compromise their safety.

They're also concerned the authorities haven't provided information about the alert in enough languages.

"Where it's safe to do so, [we've been] calling every woman that we're aware of that has a safe phone and letting her know to have it switched off well before the alert is scheduled, or to give the phone to somebody else, if that's possible," Kissouri says.

"It's often not possible, often people don't have a safe person that they've disclosed the abuse to; many women share with us that we're the first person that really knows just what's going on for them in their home and for their children as well."

title.en: Former Socceroo becomes first Australian footballer to share probable CTE diagnosis
title.zh: 前澳大利亚足球运动员成为第一位分享可能患有 CTE 诊断的澳大利亚足球运动员

summary.en: There are growing calls for restrictions on football heading after Paul Wade revealed he likely has a neurodegenerative disease.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自澳洲栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
Former Socceroos captain Paul Wade has revealed a diagnosis of probable chronic traumatic encephalopathy (CTE), a neurodegenerative disease associated with repeated head impacts.

In a statement shared by Professional Footballers Australia (PFA), Wade, who captained the Socceroos between 1990 and 1996, including at the Olympic Games and across two World Cup qualifying campaigns, says a neurologist diagnosed him with probable CTE in late 2025 after he presented with neurological symptoms in late 2024.

It makes him the first Australian footballer to disclose a diagnosis of probable CTE.

CTE is a progressive, degenerative brain disease caused by repeated head trauma, which has commonly been associated with boxers. Concerns about the risks to footballers were first raised publicly after former England striker Jeff Astle became the first British footballer found to have died from the disease. Since then, a growing body of research has revealed the link between heading the ball and increased risk of neurodegenerative disease.

While CTE is generally confirmed after death, medical specialists are able to diagnose suspected or probable cases based on an individual's background, history of repeated head knocks and symptoms of cognitive impairment.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

Wade says he is sharing his diagnosis to raise awareness of concussion, repeated head impacts and brain health across all levels of football.

"Football gave me so much. It gave me a life, a career, incredible experiences and the privilege of representing Australia. But I also must be honest about the challenges I now face and the uncertainty that comes with living with a neurodegenerative condition," he says.

"If sharing my experience can help someone seek support, create better education and prevention, or help the game take brain health more seriously, then it is worth doing.

"I do not want to discourage anyone from playing football, as I think there are so many positive health benefits. But we do need to understand more about the long-term effects of repeated head impacts and make sure that players, families and the game have the information and support they need to protect future generations."

As SBS News has previously reported, football associations in the United Kingdom and United States have introduced laws banning heading for young players, and have also limited the practice among older cohorts due to concerns about the cumulative impacts of heading the ball.

Football Australia, which is responsible for regulating football in the country, has not introduced any similar recommendations.

title.en: Gen Z is the first generation in history in which men are more religious than women
title.zh: Z世代是历史上第一代男性比女性更虔诚的人

summary.en: Religious affiliation has been in decline for decades. Now, a religious divide is appearing among gen Z men and women.
summary.zh: 这是一则来自澳洲栏目的新闻，重点涉及和平与克制。如需完整细节，请阅读英文原始报道。

body.en:
It’s not news that young Australians are less religious than their parents and grandparents. Census data has shown a steady decline in religious affiliation for decades, particularly among Christians, who remain Australia’s largest faith group.

Yet over the past few years there have been reports that seemed to point in the opposite direction. As I wrote about religious revival in countries as diverse as Japan, Thailand, China, India, Turkey, the United Kingdom and the United States, a common theme emerged. Some young people appeared to be returning to religion.

More surprising still, in many places the trend seemed increasingly driven by young men rather than young women.

To figure out what was happening in Australia, I crunched the numbers. While Australia is continuing to secularise overall, beneath that trend, gen Z appears to be the first generation where men are more likely than women to identify with a religion.

That divide is closely tied to political ideology and may reflect wider gendered political polarisation.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

In this analysis, I focus primarily on religious affiliation: whether respondents identify with a religion at all.

While church attendance tells us about participation in organised religion, affiliation captures something broader about identity, belonging and self-understanding.

The overall pattern was exactly as expected: religious affiliation declines sharply across generations. Older Australians remain significantly more likely than younger Australians to identify with a religion.

The gender pattern showed for every generation from the war generation through to millennials, women are more likely than men to report a religious affiliation.

I then zoomed in on the two youngest generations to see how the gender gap in religious affiliation has evolved over time.

Millennials (gen Y) largely follow the familiar pattern seen in older generations. Both men and women have become less religious over time, but women consistently remain ahead. In the 2025 Australian Election Study, 46.2% of gen Y women reported a religious affiliation compared with 40.3% of gen Y men.

In the 2025 survey, 55.7% of gen Z men reported a religious affiliation, compared with 43.2% of gen Z women.

And this is more than just a one-off quirk. While religious affiliation among gen Y men remained relatively stable between 2019 and 2025 (41.0% to 40.3%), affiliation among gen Z men rose from 35.3% in 2019 to 49.1% in 2022 and 55.7% in 2025.

The pattern survives after accounting for other influences. It’s also still present when political ideology, parental birthplace, marital status and place of...
body.zh: 年轻的澳大利亚人不如他们的父母和祖父母那么虔诚，这并不是什么新闻。人口普查数据显示，几十年来宗教信仰持续下降，尤其是基督徒，他们仍然是澳大利亚最大的信仰团体。 然而，在过去的几年里，有一些报道似乎指向相反的方向。当我写到日本、泰国、中国、印度、土耳其、英国和美国等不同国家的宗教复兴时，出现了一个共同的主题。一些年轻人似乎正在回归宗教。 更令人惊讶的是，在许多地方，这一趋势似乎越来越多地由年轻男性而不是年轻女性推动。 为了弄清楚澳大利亚正在发生什么，我计算了数据。虽然澳大利亚总体上继续世俗化，但在这种趋势下，Z 世代似乎是第一代男性比女性更有可能认同某种宗教的人。 这种分歧与政治意识形态密切相关，可能反映了更广泛的性别政治两极分化。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 在本次分析中，我主要关注宗教信仰：受访者是否认同某种宗教。 参加教堂活动告诉我们参与有组织的宗教活动，而归属感则涵盖了更广泛的身份、归属感和自我理解。 总体模式与预期完全一致：几代人的宗教信仰急剧下降。与年轻的澳大利亚人相比，年长的澳大利亚人仍然更有可能认同某种宗教。 性别模式显示，从战争一代到千禧一代，每一代人中，女性比男性更有可能报告宗教信仰。 然后，我放大了最年轻的两代人，看看宗教信仰中的性别差距是如何随着时间的推移而演变的。 千禧一代（Y 一代）很大程度上遵循老一辈人所熟悉的模式。随着时间的推移，男性和女性的宗教信仰都下降了，但女性始终保持领先地位。在 2025 年澳大利亚选举研究中，46.2% 的 Y 世代女性表示有宗教信仰，而 Y 世代男性的这一比例为 40.3%。 在 2025 年的调查中，55.7% 的 Z 世代男性表示有宗教信仰，而 Z 世代女性的这一比例为 43.2%。 这不仅仅是一次性的怪癖。虽然 2019 年至 2025 年间，Y 世代男性的宗教信仰保持相对稳定（41.0% 至 40.3%），但 Z 世代男性的宗教信仰从 2019 年的 35.3% 上升至 2022 年的 49.1% 和 2025 年的 55.7%。 在考虑其他影响后，该模式仍然存在。当政治意识形态、父母的出生地、婚姻状况和所在地……时，它仍然存在。

title.en: Two years into the government's social housing push, a new report says it's well behind target
title.zh: 政府推动社会保障性住房两年后，一份新报告称其远未达标

summary.en: A new report from the Australian National Audit Office indicates that the government's social housing initiative is significantly behind its stated targets.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚国家审计署的一份新报告指出，政府的社会保障性住房建设计划远未达到其既定目标。

body.en:
Less than four per cent of the social homes promised by the Albanese government's signature social housing fund have been delivered, two years into a five-year target period.

As of May 2026, 1432 of the Housing Australia Future Fund's target of 40,000 new social and affordable homes had been delivered, the Australian National Audit Office found in a report released on Tuesday.

The $10 billion fund's forecast to hit its target by mid-2029 faced "considerable uncertainty" as of June, the auditor-general found.

It's another setback for the government's broader housing supply agenda, with the construction industry about a year behind on its target to deliver 1.2 million new homes in the five years to June 2029.

Meanwhile, the social housing waitlist has grown from 155,000 to 169,000 in the 10 years to June 2024.

Your trusted source for staying up-to-date with the world around you. Get free daily news updates and analysis, straight to your inbox.

While Treasury was largely effective in designing the fund, the department had failed to take clear responsibility for delivering the program and provided little transparency about how it was progressing, the audit found.

Although funding applications opened in January 2024, Treasury had not finalised delivery arrangements until May 2026.

"The delayed finalisation of most governance and oversight arrangements has limited the ability of Treasury to systematically monitor and manage program risks and performance over time," the auditor-general said.

"Once finalised, Treasury has not always implemented governance and oversight arrangements as intended, with sometimes out-of-date and inconsistent arrangements.

The fund works by giving money to providers to either build new homes or purchase newly constructed homes from developers.

Once built, homes are subsidised by the government to provide tenants below-market rates for 25 years, at a cost of about $393,000 per dwelling in today's money.

Of the 1432 homes delivered by the fund, 762 were new homes constructed by housing providers, and 670 were newly built by private developers and purchased by a housing provider before, during or immediately after development.

The audit made five recommendations to improve governance, risk management, performance review and transparency of the program.

Housing Minister Clare O'Neil welcomed the report findings and accepted all recommendations.

"Importantly, the report found Treasury's design of the Housing Australia Future Fund was largely effective and supported by largely sound policy advice," she said.

"This program is being delivered in one of the toughest construction markets in decades.

"As building and financing costs increased, Treasury identified those pressures early, and the government acted to protect...
body.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚政府标志性社会住房基金承诺的社会住房中，只有不到 4% 已经交付，距离五年目标期已经过去两年了。 澳大利亚国家审计办公室在周二发布的一份报告中发现，截至 2026 年 5 月，澳大利亚住房未来基金的 40,000 套新社会经济适用房目标中的 1432 套已经交付。 审计长发现，截至 6 月份，该基金预计到 2029 年中期达到 100 亿美元的目标时面临“相当大的不确定性”。 这是政府更广泛的住房供应议程的又一次挫折，建筑业距离其在截至 2029 年 6 月的五年内交付 120 万套新房的目标大约落后了一年。 与此同时，截至 2024 年 6 月的 10 年间，社会住房等候名单已从 155,000 人增加到 169,000 人。 您值得信赖的来源，让您了解周围世界的最新动态。直接将免费的每日新闻更新和分析发送到您的收件箱。 审计发现，虽然财政部在设计该基金方面在很大程度上是有效的，但该部门未能明确承担实施该计划的责任，并且对该计划的进展情况几乎没有提供透明度。 尽管资金申请于 2024 年 1 月开始，但财政部直到 2026 年 5 月才最终确定交付安排。 审计长表示：“大多数治理和监督安排的延迟最终确定限制了财政部系统地监控和管理项目风险和绩效的能力。” “一旦最终确定，财政部并不总是按预期实施治理和监督安排，有时安排已经过时且不一致。 该基金的运作方式是向供应商提供资金，以建造新房或从开发商处购买新建房屋。 房屋建成后，将获得政府补贴，在 25 年内为租户提供低于市场价格的价格，按今天的价格计算，每套住宅的成本约为 393,000 美元。 在该基金交付的 1432 套住房中，762 套是由住房提供商建造的新住房，670 套是由私人开发商新建并由住房提供商在开发前、开发期间或开发后立即购买的。 审计提出了五项建议，以改善该计划的治理、风险管理、绩效审查和透明度。 住房部长克莱尔·奥尼尔对报告的调查结果表示欢迎，并接受所有建议。 “重要的是，报告发现财政部对澳大利亚住房未来基金的设计基本上是有效的，并且得到了基本上合理的政策建议的支持，”她说。 “该计划是在几十年来最艰难的建筑市场之一实施的。 “随着建筑和融资成本的增加，财政部很早就发现了这些压力，政府采取行动保护......

reflection.en: The prophet Jeremiah reminded leaders of their sacred duty to ensure justice and care for the vulnerable in society. When government initiatives aimed at providing essential needs like housing fall short, it highlights the ongoing challenge of translating good intentions into tangible support for those who need it most.
reflection.zh: 先知耶利米提醒领袖们，他们有神圣的职责，要确保社会中的弱势群体得到公正和关怀。当政府旨在提供住房等基本需求的举措未能达标时，这凸显了将良好意图转化为对最需要帮助者实际支持的持续挑战。

verse.textEn: Do what is just and right. Rescue from the hand of the oppressor the one who has been robbed.
verse.textZh: 你们要施行公平和公义，拯救被抢夺的脱离欺压人的手。
